description:
The Park Row by Meraas – Villas & Townhouses in Nad Al Sheba Gardens, Dubai

Some homes face a road. Some face another building. Every home at The Park Row faces a park. Choose 3, 4 & 5-bedroom freehold villas and townhouses in Nad Al Sheba Gardens — from AED 4.9M.

What is The Park Row by Meraas?

The Park Row by Meraas is an off-plan residential cluster within Nad Al Sheba Gardens — a master-planned gated community in Nad Al Sheba, Dubai. It offers freehold 3-bedroom townhouses and 4 & 5-bedroom standalone villas. All homes are park-facing with private gardens. Starting prices from AED 4.9 million. Located approximately 10 minutes from Downtown Dubai.

There are no apartment towers here — only ground-oriented villas and townhouses designed for families who want greenery, privacy, and room to grow.

Quick facts

  • Developer: Meraas (Dubai Holding Real Estate)
  • Location: Nad Al Sheba Gardens, Nad Al Sheba, Dubai
  • Property type: Villas & townhouses only (no apartments)
  • Bedrooms: 3, 4 and 5
  • Starting price: from AED 4.9M
  • Payment plan: 20% booking / 60% construction / 20% handover
  • Ownership: 100% freehold
  • Downtown Dubai: ~10 minutes

Villas & townhouses at The Park Row

3-bedroom townhouses

Three-level homes with an internal elevator, from about 2,700 sq ft, private rear garden, rooftop terrace, floor-to-ceiling windows, and 2 covered parking spaces. From AED 4,900,000.

4-bedroom villas

From about 4,200 sq ft with double-height living areas, private garden, park views, bronze accent screens, maids room, double garage; internal lift in select units. From AED 6,200,000.

5-bedroom villas

From about 5,400 sq ft in a park-edge position, rear garden opening to greenery, maids and driver rooms, upper family lounge, 3-car garage. From AED 8,500,000.

Location

The Park Row sits in Nad Al Sheba Gardens, between Al Ain Road (E66) and Al Khail Road (E44). Approximate drive times: Downtown & Burj Khalifa ~10 minutes, Meydan ~5 minutes, Dubai Hills Mall ~12 minutes, DXB ~18 minutes, Business Bay & DIFC ~15 minutes.

Amenities

Residents use the wider Nad Al Sheba Gardens amenity network: swimmable lagoon and beach-edge pool, wave pool, 3 km walk/cycle track, padel and basketball, skate park, yoga and events lawns, playgrounds, dog park, international school within the masterplan, mosque, and retail/F&B.

Pricing & payment plan

Unit typeFromSize (approx.)
3-bed townhouseAED 4,900,000from 2,700 sq ft
4-bed villaAED 6,200,000from 4,200 sq ft
5-bed villaAED 8,500,000from 5,400 sq ft

20 / 60 / 20: 20% on booking, 60% during construction (phased milestones), 20% on handover.

Golden Visa: Qualifying purchases above AED 2M may align with UAE 10-year Golden Visa eligibility (subject to current regulations).

Note: Prices are indicative based on comparable Nad Al Sheba Gardens phases — confirm current pricing and availability with our team.

Why invest

  • Nad Al Sheba Gardens demand: strong track record of sold-out phases and sustained family-villa demand.
  • Low-density supply near Downtown remains limited versus high-rise pipeline.
  • Meraas delivery record across flagship lifestyle destinations.
  • Rental context: gross yields in similar villa communities often cited around 5–7% annually — park-facing homes can command a premium (market-dependent).

About Meraas

Meraas is a Dubai master developer and member of Dubai Holding Real Estate. Portfolio highlights include City Walk, Bluewaters Island, Port de La Mer, and BVLGARI Resort & Residences. Nad Al Sheba Gardens is a flagship villa masterplan for family-oriented, low-density living.

Disclaimer

Prices are indicative estimates based on comparable Nad Al Sheba Gardens phases by Meraas. This listing is presented by a RERA-authorised real estate agent. Content is for information only and does not constitute an offer or guarantee. Prices and availability may change without notice.

description:
Live Where Dubai's Skyline Meets the World's Largest Crystal Lagoon.

District One Views — District One, MBR City, Dubai

District One Views is an exclusive residential development within District One — one of Dubai's most prestigious waterfront communities, located in Mohammed Bin Rashid City (MBR City). Offering contemporary apartments with direct views of the iconic 7km Crystal Lagoon and the Downtown Dubai skyline, District One Views places residents at the very centre of Dubai's most ambitious urban masterplan.

Location: District One, Mohammed Bin Rashid City (MBR City), Dubai · Master developer: Meydan Sobha / Nakheel · Property type: 1, 2 & 3 bedroom waterfront apartments · Status: Off-plan · Ownership: Freehold · Enquire now for pricing and payment plan.

About the Project

What is District One Views?

District One Views is a premium apartment development within the iconic District One community in Mohammed Bin Rashid City. Designed for residents who demand both urban convenience and natural beauty, the project offers a curated collection of 1, 2, and 3-bedroom apartments surrounded by the lush greenery, crystal-clear lagoon waters, and white sand beaches that have made District One one of the most sought-after addresses in Dubai.

District One Views is part of a community that has redefined waterfront living in the heart of Dubai — combining the prestige of a central location with the serenity of a private island lifestyle, all within one of the world's most ambitious master developments.

Key project highlights:

  • Waterfront apartments with direct Crystal Lagoon and Dubai skyline views
  • Located in District One — Dubai's most prestigious lagoon community
  • 1, 2, and 3-bedroom apartments with premium finishes
  • Access to 7km Crystal Lagoon, 14km white sand beach, and 8.4km cycling track
  • Gated community with world-class amenities
  • Developed within MBR City — 20% larger than Manhattan
  • Minutes from Downtown Dubai, Business Bay, and Burj Khalifa

Location

Where is District One Views located?

District One Views is situated within District One, Mohammed Bin Rashid City — located in the heart of Dubai between Business Bay and Meydan. MBR City was launched in 2012 by His Highness Sheikh Mohammed bin Rashid Al Maktoum and spans a total area 20% larger than Manhattan, making it one of the most ambitious urban developments in the world.

District One itself sits at the centre of MBR City surrounded by 65% green space, a 7km Crystal Lagoon, and 14km of private white sand beaches, yet connected to every major destination in Dubai within minutes.

Key distances and connectivity:

  • 12 minutes to Dubai Mall and Downtown Dubai
  • 20 minutes to Palm Jumeirah
  • 30 minutes to Dubai International Airport (DXB)
  • 6 minutes to Business Bay Metro Station
  • Direct access to Al Khail Road and Meydan Road
  • Close to DIFC, Business Bay, and Sheikh Zayed Road

District One Views residents enjoy island-like serenity with full urban connectivity — a combination that is unique to District One within Dubai's residential landscape.

District One community — what makes it special?

The crown jewel of MBR City

District One is widely regarded as one of Dubai's most prestigious residential addresses — a gated waterfront community that blends natural beauty with world-class infrastructure across 501 hectares of prime Dubai land.

District One community highlights:

  • 7km Crystal Lagoon — the first of its kind in the Middle East and the world's largest man-made lagoon, encircling the entire community
  • 14km white sand beach — exclusive private beachfront access for residents
  • 8.4km cycling and jogging track
  • 65%+ green space — parks, lawns, and landscaped gardens
  • 501 hectares of master-planned community
  • Smart home integration in all residences
  • 24/7 gated security and community management

Community infrastructure

  • Supermarket and pharmacy within the community
  • Nursery and kids' play areas
  • Clubhouse, gym, and lagoon beach facilities
  • Mosque within the community
  • Community healthcare centre
  • Meydan Grandstand and 5-star Meydan Hotel — adjacent
  • The Track Meydan Golf — 9-hole floodlit golf course — next door
  • Meydan One Mall — upcoming, one of the world's largest

Property types at District One Views

District One Views offers a focused collection of apartment formats, all designed to maximise natural light, Crystal Lagoon views, and connection to the community's extraordinary outdoor lifestyle.

Available unit types:

  1. 1 bedroom apartments — Smart, contemporary layouts ideal for professionals and investors. Floor-to-ceiling windows with lagoon or garden views.
  2. 2 bedroom apartments — Spacious family-friendly layouts with open-plan living and generous balconies overlooking the Crystal Lagoon and green spaces.
  3. 3 bedroom apartments — Larger family residences with premium finishes, multiple en-suite bathrooms, and panoramic community views.

Architecture and design features

  • Floor-to-ceiling windows maximizing Crystal Lagoon and skyline views
  • Open-plan layouts with contemporary interiors
  • Premium finishes and high-quality materials throughout
  • Smart home integration — standard in all units
  • Spacious balconies and terraces
  • Low to mid-rise towers in a gated, landscaped setting
  • Natural light-filled interiors with lagoon-facing orientation

Residences and pricing

Prices are indicative based on current District One community market data. Contact H&S Real Estate for confirmed pricing and availability for District One Views. Request the latest price list and floor plans.

Payment plan

  • Structured off-plan payment plan with competitive down payment
  • Phased instalments during construction
  • Final payment on handover
  • All units above AED 2M eligible for UAE 10-year Golden Visa

Is District One Views a good investment?

District One has consistently been one of Dubai's strongest performing residential communities for both rental yield and capital appreciation. District One Views offers buyers direct access to this high-demand market at a competitive off-plan entry price.

  • Prime central location — District One sits at the geographic centre of Dubai — 12 minutes from Downtown, 6 minutes from Business Bay Metro, and connected to all major business and lifestyle destinations.
  • Crystal Lagoon premium — Lagoon-view properties in District One command a consistent price premium in both sales and rental markets. The 7km Crystal Lagoon is a permanent, irreplaceable asset.
  • Scarcity value — District One is a fully planned, gated community with limited new residential inventory. Off-plan releases are rare and generate strong buyer demand.
  • Strong rental demand — District One attracts high-income professionals, expat families, and corporate tenants who pay premium rents for lagoon views and community quality. Average ROI in MBR City reaches 8%.
  • MBR City growth trajectory — As Meydan One Mall, new hospitality, and infrastructure projects complete, values across MBR City — including District One — are expected to appreciate significantly.
  • Golden Visa eligibility — Units above AED 2M qualify buyers for the UAE 10-year Golden Visa.

Ideal investment horizon: 3–7 years for strong rental income and capital growth within one of Dubai's most established luxury communities.

Lifestyle and amenities

Living at District One Views:

  • Direct access to the 7km Crystal Lagoon — swimming, kayaking, water activities
  • 14km exclusive white sand beach — private residents only
  • 8.4km cycling and jogging track
  • Community pools, gym, and fitness facilities
  • Lagoon beach clubs and waterfront promenades
  • Smart home technology in every residence
  • Landscaped parks and children's play areas
  • Pet-friendly green open spaces

Nearby destinations

  • Meydan Hotel 5-star — adjacent
  • The Track Meydan Golf — next door
  • Meydan Racecourse and Grandstand — 5 minutes
  • Meydan One Mall — upcoming
  • Downtown Dubai and Dubai Mall — 12 minutes
  • Business Bay and DIFC — 15 minutes
  • Jumeirah Beach — 20 minutes
  • Palm Jumeirah — 20 minutes

Who should buy?

Ideal for:

  • Families seeking a prestigious gated community with lagoon and beach access
  • Investors seeking strong rental yields in an established luxury community
  • Professionals working in Business Bay, Downtown, or DIFC
  • International buyers seeking UAE Golden Visa eligibility
  • Buyers wanting Crystal Lagoon views at off-plan pricing
  • Long-term capital growth investors in MBR City

Not suitable for: buyers seeking standalone beachfront or sea-facing coastal villas; very short-term flip investors.

description:
Island Living Redefined. Welcome to Bay Collection, Dubai Islands.

Bay Collection at Dubai Islands by Nakheel

Bay Collection at Dubai Islands is Nakheel's premium villa and townhouse offering on one of Dubai's most exciting new island destinations. Part of the Bay series which includes Bay Villas and Bay Collective Bay Collection brings a curated selection of beachfront residences to the Arabian Gulf coastline, combining barefoot luxury architecture, private beach access, and resort-style living just 20 minutes from Downtown Dubai.

Location: Dubai Islands (Islands B & C), Dubai · Developer: Nakheel Dubai Holding Real Estate · Property type: 3 to 6 bedroom beachfront villas and townhouses · Status: Off-plan · Ownership: Freehold · Enquire now for pricing and payment plan.

About the Project

What is Bay Collection at Dubai Islands?

Bay Collection at Dubai Islands is a luxury waterfront residential community developed by Nakheel the master developer behind Palm Jumeirah, Palm Jebel Ali, and the entire Dubai Islands masterplan. Positioned on Islands B and C of Dubai Islands, Bay Collection is part of Nakheel's broader Bay series of villa communities, designed to deliver a new generation of coastal living on Dubai's northern shoreline.

Unlike high-rise apartment developments on Dubai Islands, Bay Collection is a low-density, villa-focused enclave. Every home is designed around space, privacy, and a direct connection to the sea with beachfront plots, private pools, and generous outdoor living areas that blur the boundary between indoor comfort and island life.

Key project highlights:

  • Low-density beachfront villa and townhouse community on Dubai Islands
  • 3 to 6 bedroom residences with private beach access and sea views
  • Part of Nakheel's Bay series alongside Bay Villas and Bay Collective
  • Barefoot luxury design open-plan, light-filled, Arabian Gulf-facing homes
  • Resort-style community amenities including beach clubs and marinas
  • Developed by Nakheel the creator of Palm Jumeirah
  • Prices starting from AED 4 million

Location

Where is Bay Collection located?

Bay Collection is situated on Dubai Islands Nakheel's five-island coastal masterplan positioned just off the Deira coastline in northeastern Dubai. Connected to the mainland via dedicated island bridges and the Infinity Bridge, Dubai Islands offers true island living without sacrificing the connectivity and convenience that Dubai residents expect.

Key distances and connectivity:

  • 20 minutes to Dubai International Airport (DXB)
  • 24 minutes to Downtown Dubai and Dubai Mall
  • 25 minutes to DIFC and Business Bay
  • Connected via Infinity Bridge and dedicated island road network
  • Near Port Rashid, Dubai Creek, and Deira landmarks
  • Access by both road and sea routes

Dubai Islands adds over 20 km of new beachfront to Dubai and Bay Collection residents enjoy direct access to some of the finest stretches of this coastline.

Dubai Islands vs other waterfront communities

  • Lower entry pricing vs Palm Jumeirah and Palm Jebel Ali
  • Early development stage stronger appreciation potential
  • Newer infrastructure built to Dubai 2040 standards
  • Less density, more green space, and more beach per resident

Dubai Islands masterplan by Nakheel

The bigger picture

Dubai Islands is Nakheel's most significant new coastal project a 17 sq km, five-island masterplan that transforms Dubai's northern shoreline into a world-class waterfront destination. Aligned with the Dubai 2040 Urban Master Plan, Dubai Islands is designed to be a self-sufficient island community offering beaches, marinas, hotels, retail, golf, and luxury residences in one integrated environment.

Dubai Islands masterplan highlights:

  • 17 sq km across five interconnected islands
  • 20+ km of new pristine beachfront added to Dubai
  • 80+ luxury hotels and beach resorts planned
  • 9 Nakheel marinas with over 1,300 berths
  • 2 sq km of landscaped parks and open green spaces
  • Premium golf course overlooking the Arabian Gulf
  • Two hotels already operational Hotel Riu Dubai and Centara Mirage Beach Resort
  • Nakheel Dubai Islands Shopping Mall upcoming

Nakheel new projects at Dubai Islands

  • Bay Villas (Island B) 3 to 6BR villas and townhouses. AED 2.6 billion construction contract awarded.
  • Bay Grove Residences (Phases 1–4) 1 to 4BR waterfront apartments with Crystal Beach access
  • Bay Collective (Islands B & C) Luxury waterfront villa and townhouse community
  • Bay Collection Premium beachfront villa community within the Bay series
  • Rixos Residences Branded luxury residences with 5-star hotel amenities
  • Bay Estate (Island E) Most exclusive villa community. Phase 1 launched March 2026.

Property types at Bay Collection

Bay Collection offers a diverse range of villa and townhouse formats, each crafted for a specific lifestyle and budget from coastal family townhouses to expansive beachfront estates.

Available villa and townhouse types:

  1. 3 bedroom townhouses Contemporary island townhouses with private gardens, open-plan living, and community beach access. The ideal entry point into Dubai Islands villa living.
  2. 4 bedroom garden villas Spacious single-family villas with large private gardens, pools, and Arabian Gulf orientation.
  3. 4 bedroom semi-detached villas Modern paired villas offering privacy, contemporary design, and shared community facilities.
  4. 5 bedroom waterfront villas Expansive waterfront plots with panoramic sea views, private pools, and direct promenade access.
  5. 6 bedroom beachfront villas The most premium format triple storey residences with private beach access, show kitchens, rooftop lounges, and full Arabian Gulf frontage.

Architecture and design features

  • Barefoot luxury design contemporary coastal architecture with natural finishes
  • Floor-to-ceiling windows maximizing sea views and natural light
  • Open-plan living spaces with indoor-outdoor flow
  • Private swimming pools and landscaped gardens
  • Arabesque design elements and warm wood finishes reflecting Emirati heritage
  • Premium imported materials and high-end kitchen fittings
  • All bedrooms with en-suite bathrooms
  • Maid's room and driver's room included in all villa types
  • Smart home integration

Residences and pricing

Note: Prices are based on comparable Nakheel Bay series launches at Dubai Islands. Contact H&S Real Estate for confirmed current pricing and available inventory. Request the latest price list and floor plans.

Payment plan

  • 15% down payment on booking
  • 65% during construction phased instalments
  • 20% on handover
  • 80/20 and 70/30 plans available on select units
  • All units above AED 2M eligible for UAE 10-year Golden Visa

Is Bay Collection a good investment?

Bay Collection at Dubai Islands sits at the intersection of three powerful investment forces: Nakheel's developer credibility, Dubai Islands' early-stage growth trajectory, and the permanent scarcity value of beachfront land.

  • Early stage growth Dubai Islands is in its active development phase. Buyers entering now benefit from pre-infrastructure pricing before hotels, marinas, retail, and resort openings drive values higher.
  • Beachfront scarcity Dubai Islands adds 20+ km of new coastline, but beachfront villa plots remain finite. Once sold, they cannot be replicated.
  • Nakheel track record Nakheel created Palm Jumeirah one of the most valuable real estate addresses on Earth. Their Dubai Islands masterplan follows the same blueprint of long-term value creation.
  • Dubai 2040 alignment Dubai Islands is embedded in Dubai's official long-term urban plan. Government infrastructure investment will continue for decades.
  • Tourism and hospitality growth 80+ planned hotels create sustained demand for island living from both residents and short-term rental operators.
  • Golden Visa eligibility All Bay Collection villas are priced above the minimum threshold for the UAE 10-year Golden Visa.

Ideal investment horizon: 5–10 years for maximum capital appreciation as the island matures.

Lifestyle and amenities

Living at Bay Collection, Dubai Islands:

  • Private beach access for villa residents
  • Private swimming pools and landscaped gardens
  • Beach club with resort-style leisure facilities
  • Three community pool houses
  • Linear park leading directly to the waterfront
  • Shoreline park and beachfront promenade
  • Sports courts and fitness zones
  • Children's playgrounds and family areas
  • Marina access and water sports
  • Barbecue areas and outdoor entertaining spaces

Nearby at Dubai Islands

  • Hotel Riu Dubai operational beachfront resort
  • Centara Mirage Beach Resort Dubai operational family resort
  • Nakheel Dubai Islands Shopping Mall upcoming
  • Premium golf course overlooking the Arabian Gulf
  • City Centre Deira 15 minutes
  • Dubai Creek and Deira souks 20 minutes
  • Dubai International Airport 20 minutes

Who should buy?

Ideal for:

  • Families seeking spacious beachfront villa living in Dubai
  • Investors targeting early-stage Dubai Islands appreciation
  • International buyers seeking UAE Golden Visa eligibility
  • Buyers seeking beachfront villas at lower entry than Palm Jumeirah
  • Long-term capital growth investors with a 5–10 year horizon
  • Short-term rental investors targeting Dubai's tourism market (subject to DTCM rules)

Not suitable for: buyers seeking apartments or high-rise residences; investors requiring immediate central city proximity; very short-term flip investors.

Buy Bay Collection with H&S Real Estate

Bay Collection villas are released in phases with limited inventory. Dubai Islands beachfront plots are finite once a phase sells out, those plots are gone permanently. H&S Real Estate provides buyers with direct access to the latest Bay Collection availability before public launch.

H&S Real Estate assists buyers with: priority access to latest phase availability; official Nakheel pricing and floor plan review; payment plan structuring and ROI analysis; villa selection advisory best plot, type, and beach positioning; full reservation and booking support. Contact H&S Real Estate today for latest availability and pricing for Bay Collection, Dubai Islands.

description:
Dubai's most exclusive new island villa community: Bay Estate at Dubai Islands by Nakheel is the first residential release on Island E the Luxury Estates Island within Nakheel's five-island masterplan. A limited collection of 3 to 7 bedroom beachfront villas and townhouses with private beach access, Arabian Gulf views, and barefoot luxury living on one of the last great stretches of Dubai's northern coastline.

Location: Island E, Dubai Islands, Dubai · Developer: Nakheel (Dubai Holding Real Estate) · Status: Off-Plan Phase 1 launched March 2026 · Ownership: Freehold

About the Project

While other Dubai Islands focus on apartments and mixed-use communities, Island E is purpose-planned as a low-density villa enclave private, spacious, and built for buyers who want exclusivity. Bay Estate Phase 1 offers curated 3 to 7-bedroom villas and townhouses with direct beachfront access, marina connectivity, and resort-style community amenities.

Location & Connectivity

Dubai Islands Masterplan

Property Types & Indicative Pricing

Payment Plan & Investment

Structured off-plan payments with low booking deposit, milestone instalments, and post-handover options on select units. Island scarcity on E, Nakheel's track record, and Dubai 2040 alignment support long-term coastal investment ideal for a 5–10 year horizon.

Lifestyle

Private beaches, pools, marinas, promenades, parks, beach clubs, golf, and retail within Dubai Islands island seclusion with city connectivity.

Buy with H&S Real Estate

Priority access to Phase 1 inventory, official Nakheel pricing review, payment structuring, villa comparison, and full booking support. Enquire now for the latest price list and floor plans.

description:
City Walk Crestlane by Meraas is the first waterside residential community within the City Walk district, part of Meraas's flagship urban lifestyle destination in Jumeirah. A collection of 1 to 4 bedroom apartments and park-facing duplexes, Crestlane pairs contemporary waterfront architecture with lush landscaping and resort-style living in one of Dubai's most walkable neighbourhoods.

About the Project

Launched across multiple phases (Crestlane 1 through 5, with phases 4 and 5 announced in December 2025), the project introduces over 1,000 residences. Unlike conventional towers, Crestlane is built around water: flowing water features run through the community, surrounding buildings with calm reflections and a resort-like feel unique within City Walk.

  • First waterside residential community within City Walk Dubai
  • 1 to 4 bedroom apartments and exclusive 4 bedroom park-facing duplexes
  • Water cinema, overwater wellness centre, and resort-style pools
  • Prices from AED 2.6M with Golden Visa eligibility from the first unit (subject to rules)

Location & Connectivity

City Walk sits between Sheikh Zayed Road and Al Wasl Road in Jumeirah, putting residents near Downtown, the beach, and major landmarks. Indicative connectivity: about 5 minutes to Downtown and Burj Khalifa, about 10 minutes to Jumeirah Beach, about 15 minutes to DXB, walking distance to Coca-Cola Arena, Museum of the Future, and The Green Planet, plus close access to DIFC, Business Bay, and Dubai Mall.

City Walk Neighbourhood

City Walk is a European-style, pedestrian-friendly district mixing luxury residences, retail, dining, hotels, and entertainment. Highlights include Coca-Cola Arena, The Green Planet, Museum of the Future, premium retail, fine dining, Rove and Address City Walk, and access toward Jumeirah Beach and La Mer. Versus many central areas, City Walk is often more walkable, greener, and lower-density.

Unit Types & Design

Mid-rise towers sit in landscaped water gardens with shaded walkways. Homes range from compact 1 bedroom layouts to large 4 bedroom apartments and rare 4 bedroom park duplexes with double-height space and private terraces. Features include floor-to-ceiling glazing, open-plan layouts, German kitchen appliances, Vastu-friendly options, and sizes from about 805 sq ft (1BR) up to about 4,819 sq ft (4BR duplex).

Residences & Pricing (Indicative)

Confirm live pricing and phase stock with H&S. Indicative launch brackets:

  • 1 BR (805-1,000 sq ft) - from ~AED 2.6M
  • 2 BR (1,200-1,600 sq ft) - from ~AED 3.8M
  • 3 BR (1,800-2,400 sq ft) - from ~AED 5.5M
  • 4 BR apartment (3,000-4,819 sq ft) - from ~AED 8M
  • 4 BR park duplex - price on request

Payment Plan

Structured off-plan payments typically include 20% on booking, phased instalments during construction, and 25% on handover from Q4 2028 onwards. EOI options may apply. Exact schedules depend on phase and unit - H&S can review the official Meraas plan with you.

Investment & Yields

City Walk combines a central lifestyle address with Meraas delivery and strong tenant demand. Market commentary often cites rental yields around 5-7% annually; example: 1 bedroom rents from about AED 140,000 per year in early 2025 context (not a guarantee). Waterfront positioning and limited comparable supply can support long-term resale narrative. Typical horizon discussed: 3-7 years.

Lifestyle & Amenities

On-site: water cinema, overwater wellness, pools, gyms, jogging and cycling tracks, padel and tennis, co-working, lounges, yoga lawns, event lawns, kids zones, and pet-friendly parks. Around City Walk: arena events, The Green Planet, Museum of the Future, retail, rooftop dining, and beach access within minutes.

Who It Suits

Strong fit for urban professionals, families wanting schools and entertainment nearby, investors targeting central Dubai yields, international buyers considering Golden Visa, and end-users who want a walkable Meraas address. Less suited for large suburban villa requirements or private beach inside the project.

description:
The Edit at D3 by Meraas rises along the Dubai Canal promenade in Dubai Design District (D3) - three sculptural waterfront towers with 557 residences, from 1–4 bedroom apartments to rare signature penthouses with private pools. Handover is targeted for June 2030, with a payment plan structured as 20% on booking, 55% during construction (phased 2026–2028), and 25% on handover. Freehold ownership; units above AED 2M align with UAE Golden Visa eligibility.

About the Project

Launched in late 2025, The Edit at D3 is a vertical neighbourhood: live-work-play around creativity, wellness, and waterfront living - adjacent to the fully sold-out Atelis at D3, underscoring demand for residential inventory in D3.

  • Three towers on the Dubai Canal promenade
  • Sky gardens integrated into the façades
  • Direct canal and city skyline views
  • 1BR–4BR apartments and 5BR signature penthouses (only three penthouses)

Location & Connectivity

D3 sits between Downtown Dubai and Dubai Creek, offering a design-led environment with fast access to business hubs.

  • ~5 km to Downtown and Burj Khalifa
  • ~10 minutes to Dubai Mall
  • ~12 km to DXB
  • Bus routes D03 / D03A; future metro within D3 planned

D3 Masterplan Context

The project sits in the expanded D3 masterplan - a large waterfront neighbourhood between Downtown and the Creek. The Edit is positioned in the Creekside zone (premium waterfront). The Design Line is a shaded, car-free spine linking zones including Design HQ, Soho, Sanctuary, and Mindspace.

Residences & Pricing (Indicative)

Official launch pricing should be confirmed with H&S; indicative brackets from developer materials:

  • 4 BR (2,500–3,000 sq ft) - from ~AED 10.7M
  • 5 BR Signature Penthouse (5,000+ sq ft) - from ~AED 34.1M

Architecture & Design

Curved forms, flowing balconies, sky gardens, floor-to-ceiling glazing, natural stone interiors, smart home integration, and premium imported finishes.

Investment Angle

Limited residential supply in D3, waterfront premium, strong creative and corporate tenant profile, and Meraas’s delivery track record support a 3–7 year investment view - rental yields in the district are often quoted in the 6–8% range subject to unit and lease terms.

Lifestyle & Dining Nearby

On-site style amenities include pools, wellness, fitness, co-working, sky gardens, family zones, gaming lounges, and cinema. Nearby in D3: The Lighthouse, Akiba Dori, Vicolo, Home Bakery, The Espresso Lab, Warehouse Gym, The Block, plus Dubai Design Week and Fashion Week activations.

description:
Own a Piece of Dubai's Most Ambitious Island.
Palm Central Palm Jebel Ali, Dubai

Palm Central at Palm Jebel Ali is where ultra-luxury meets the Arabian Sea. A private collection of beachfront villas and contemporary mansions set within Dubai's largest palm-shaped island, Palm Central is not just a home it is a generational coastal asset positioned at the frontier of Dubai's next luxury wave.

Location: Palm Jebel Ali, Jebel Ali, Dubai · Property type: Beachfront villas and ultra-luxury mansions · Status: Off-plan · Ownership: Freehold · Enquire now for pricing and payment plan.

About the Project

What is Palm Central at Palm Jebel Ali?

Palm Central is a curated beachfront villa community within Palm Jebel Ali the world's largest man-made island development, now under an ambitious revival by Nakheel and Dubai Holding. While Palm Jebel Ali spans the entire island, Palm Central is the premium residential villa cluster specifically earmarked for early off-plan release, giving buyers first access to the island's most sought-after plots.

This is not a high-rise apartment project. Palm Central is purely a villa and mansion community low density, high exclusivity, and built for buyers who want private beachfront living away from the crowds.

Key project characteristics:

  • Exclusive beachfront villa plots on the Palm fronds
  • Ultra-low density private and secluded by design
  • Direct sea-facing orientation with panoramic water views
  • Part of the most ambitious island redevelopment in the Middle East
  • Early-phase access before full island price appreciation

Location

Where is Palm Central located?

Palm Central sits within Palm Jebel Ali, positioned along the Jebel Ali coastline on the southern end of Sheikh Zayed Road. It is surrounded by open sea on three sides, giving residents unobstructed ocean views and direct beach access something impossible to replicate in mainland Dubai.

Key distances and connectivity:

  • 25 minutes to Dubai Marina and JBR
  • 20 minutes to Expo City Dubai
  • 15 minutes to Al Maktoum International Airport (soon to be one of the world's largest)
  • Direct access to Sheikh Zayed Road (E11)
  • Close proximity to Jebel Ali Free Zone and Dubai South

With Al Maktoum International Airport expanding, the surrounding Jebel Ali zone is rapidly becoming one of Dubai's highest-growth corridors and Palm Central sits at its heart.

Palm Jebel Ali master plan

The bigger picture

Palm Jebel Ali is nearly twice the size of Palm Jumeirah. The master plan by Nakheel covers 13.4 km of coastline, seven island segments, and is designed to house over 35 hotels, marinas, retail districts, and thousands of beachfront residences. Palm Central occupies the premium residential frond zone within this master plan.

Master plan highlights:

  • 13.4 km of new coastline added to Dubai
  • Seven interconnected island frond segments
  • 35+ luxury hotels and beach resorts planned
  • Full marina, retail, and leisure integration
  • Dedicated waterfront promenades and cycling tracks

Palm Central is positioned directly on the fronds the most exclusive and sought-after plots within the entire Palm Jebel Ali layout.

Palm Central villas property types

Palm Central offers a focused collection of villa formats, each designed around one principle: maximum sea view and minimum compromise.

Available villa types:

  1. 4 bedroom beachfront villa spacious family villa with private beach, pool, and full sea-facing orientation.
  2. 5 bedroom signature villa larger layout with extended terraces, double-height living spaces, and panoramic glazing.
  3. 6 bedroom ultra-luxury mansion statement residence for ultra-high-net-worth buyers seeking the largest plots on the Palm frond.

Design and architecture

  • Contemporary coastal architecture with clean-line facades
  • Floor-to-ceiling glazing for unobstructed sea views
  • Private infinity pools and sun terraces
  • Smart home automation systems
  • Premium imported materials and finishes
  • Energy-efficient construction with sustainable design principles

Residences and pricing

Pricing is phase-dependent and subject to availability. Early launch buyers benefit from pre-appreciation entry rates. Contact H&S Real Estate for confirmed pricing.

Payment plan

  • Structured off-plan payment plan with low initial down payment
  • Phased instalments tied to construction milestones
  • Post-handover payment options available on select units
  • Early buyers benefit from launch pricing before phase escalations

Is Palm Central a good investment?

Dubai's beachfront villa market is supply-constrained by geography. You cannot create more coastline. Palm Central offers one of the last remaining opportunities to own a new-build beachfront villa within a Palm-branded island at early-phase pricing.

  • Beachfront scarcity private beachfront villas in Dubai are among the rarest and most resilient asset classes.
  • Early cycle entry Palm Jebel Ali is in active development; buying now means entering before full island infrastructure and hotel openings push prices higher.
  • Palm brand premium the Palm brand commands global recognition that supports resale values above comparable non-Palm locations.
  • Airport mega-growth Al Maktoum International Airport expansion will make Jebel Ali one of the most connected districts in Dubai within the next decade.
  • Tourism integration 35+ planned hotels create long-term demand from hospitality and tourism, supporting villa values island-wide.

Best suited for investors with a 5–10 year horizon seeking capital growth over rental yield.

Lifestyle and amenities

Living at Palm Central:

  • Private beach access directly from your villa
  • Infinity pool and landscaped garden
  • Island walking and cycling promenades
  • Marina access and water sports
  • Future beach clubs and resort-style facilities
  • Curated retail, dining, and cafe districts on the Palm

Nearby destinations

  • Expo City Dubai ~20 minutes
  • Dubai Marina and JBR Beach ~25 minutes
  • Ibn Battuta Mall ~15 minutes
  • Al Maktoum International Airport ~15 minutes
  • Jebel Ali Free Zone ~10 minutes

Who should buy Palm Central?

Ideal for:

  • Ultra-high-net-worth buyers seeking a private coastal estate
  • Long-term investors targeting Palm Jebel Ali appreciation
  • International buyers seeking a legacy Dubai asset
  • Families wanting private beach living outside the city centre
  • Investors building a luxury Dubai real estate portfolio

Not suitable for: buyers seeking high short-term rental yields, small-budget investors, or those needing central city proximity.

Buy Palm Central villas with H&S Real Estate

Palm Central villa inventory is released in limited phases. Early registration gives buyers priority access to the best frond plots before public launch. H&S Real Estate provides end-to-end buying support for Palm Central at Palm Jebel Ali: priority access to latest phase availability, official pricing and floor plan review, payment plan structuring and ROI analysis, villa selection advisory, and full reservation and booking support. Contact H&S Real Estate today to secure your Palm Central villa.

faqs.answer: Yes. Given the property values at Palm Central, buyers are likely to qualify for the UAE Golden Visa, subject to final registered property value and UAE regulations at the time of purchase.

description:
Shahrukhz by Danube Tower – Luxury Waterfront Apartments in Al Sufouh, Dubai

A 55-storey architectural masterpiece in Al Sufouh, offering luxury waterfront apartments with panoramic views, wellness amenities, and the prestige of Shah Rukh Khan's vision — created by Danube Properties.

What is Shahrukhz by Danube Tower?

Shahrukhz by Danube Tower is a luxury residential development in Al Sufouh, Dubai, created by Danube Properties in collaboration with Bollywood superstar Shah Rukh Khan. This 55-storey architectural gem features high-end apartments and modern office spaces, offering residents a combination of luxury living, waterfront views, and wellness amenities.

The development represents the pinnacle of luxury living in Al Sufouh, combining Danube Properties' proven expertise with Shah Rukh Khan's iconic brand to create an unparalleled residential experience.

Quick facts

  • Developer: Danube Properties
  • Location: Al Sufouh, Dubai
  • Property type: Luxury apartments, penthouses & commercial units
  • Bedrooms: Studio, 1 & 2 bedroom
  • Starting price: from AED 2,100,000
  • Payment plan: 70/30 post-handover
  • Government fee: 4% (Dubai Land Department)
  • Ownership: 100% freehold
  • Expected completion: Q4 2028 – Q4 2029

Apartments at Shahrukhz Tower

Studio apartments

Smart layouts starting from 500 sq ft with modern finishes, lake views, and ideal for investors. From AED 2,100,000.

One bedroom apartments

Spacious living areas starting from 700 sq ft with smart home technology, waterfront views, and perfect for couples. From AED 2,500,000.

Two bedroom apartments

Family-sized living starting from 1,200 sq ft with premium finishes, panoramic views, and flexible layouts. From AED 3,500,000.

Architectural design features

Shahrukhz Tower features a striking glass-and-steel façade creating a modern luxurious appearance. Key design elements include:

  • Glass-and-steel façade: innovative glass exterior creating stunning visual impact
  • Rooftop helipad: exclusive access adding ultimate convenience and prestige
  • Luxurious sky pool: rooftop infinity pool with panoramic views
  • Smart layouts: flexible interiors with intelligent space planning
  • Elegant office spaces: modern commercial units for business professionals
  • Premium finishes: high-quality materials and contemporary design throughout

Wellness & smart home features

Shahrukhz Tower incorporates comprehensive wellness amenities promoting a balanced and healthy lifestyle:

  • Luxurious sky pool — rooftop infinity pool with breathtaking views
  • Japanese onsen baths — traditional thermal wellness experience
  • Modern fitness centre — state-of-the-art gym equipment
  • Yoga & meditation spaces — dedicated wellness zones for mindfulness
  • Tranquility garden — peaceful outdoor relaxation areas
  • Smart home technology — app-controlled lighting, climate management, and security

Waterfront living

Shahrukhz Tower offers premium waterfront apartments in Al Sufouh with panoramic views of surrounding waterways, Palm Jumeirah, and Dubai Marina. Residents enjoy peaceful waterfront living while remaining close to Dubai's famous landmarks and entertainment destinations.

Location & connectivity

Shahrukhz by Danube Tower is located in Al Sufouh, one of Dubai's most coveted areas, known for luxury homes and easy access to iconic landmarks.

  • Palm Jumeirah: ~5 minutes
  • Dubai Marina: ~3 minutes
  • Mall of the Emirates: ~10 minutes
  • Jumeirah Lake Towers: ~8 minutes
  • Dubai International Airport: ~30 minutes
  • DMCC Metro Station: nearby
  • Sheikh Zayed Road: direct access

Pricing & payment plan

Unit typeFromSize (approx.)
StudioAED 2,100,000from 500 sq ft
1-BedroomAED 2,500,000from 700 sq ft
2-BedroomAED 3,500,000from 1,200 sq ft

70/30 post-handover plan: 70% payable during construction, 30% upon handover. Additionally, a 4% government fee (Dubai Land Department) applies.

Golden Visa: Qualifying investments above AED 2M may be eligible for the UAE 10-year Golden Visa (subject to current regulations).

Investment benefits

  • Premium Al Sufouh location ensures strong ROI potential
  • Flexible 70/30 post-handover payment structure
  • Freehold ownership for international buyers
  • UAE residency visa eligibility for qualifying investments
  • Danube Properties reputation — trusted developer with proven track record
  • Celebrity brand value — Shah Rukh Khan association adds prestige
  • Waterfront residences with high rental potential
  • Mixed-use development with residential and commercial units

About Danube Properties

Danube Properties is a leading real estate developer in Dubai known for luxury residential and commercial properties. With a proven track record of delivering quality projects, Danube Properties has established itself as a trusted name in Dubai's thriving real estate market.

Disclaimer

Prices are indicative estimates based on publicly available information. This listing is presented by a RERA-authorised real estate agent. Content is for information only and does not constitute an offer or guarantee. Prices and availability may change without notice.

description:
Montiva by Vida at Dubai Creek Harbour is a Vida-branded apartment tower by Emaar Properties in the lush Green Gate District. The development offers 1, 2 and 3-bedroom residences (including 3-bedroom + maid layouts), with sizes from about 755 sq ft to 1,911 sq ft, contemporary façades, generous glazing, and a calm, nature-led aesthetic aligned with the Vida brand.

Location & Connectivity

Situated on the Dubai Creek Harbour waterfront, residents are close to Creek Marina, parks, yacht harbours and community retail. Typical driving times are about 10 minutes to Downtown Dubai, 15 minutes to Dubai International Airport (DXB), and 40 minutes to Al Maktoum International Airport. The area is also set to benefit from improved connectivity via the upcoming Dubai Metro Blue Line.

Residences & Design

Layouts emphasize natural light, practical storage and open living. Many homes capture park, marina, Burj Khalifa or skyline outlooks. Finishes reflect a refined, hotel-inspired Vida look—suited to end-users and investors who want branded off-plan apartments in Dubai Creek Harbour.

Amenities & Lifestyle

The community focuses on wellness and outdoor living: infinity pool with sunset decks, a splash zone for children, garden courtyards, shaded lawns, zen gardens, social plazas, fitness and yoga terraces, and concierge-style leisure spaces—consistent with an upscale Creek Harbour lifestyle.

Investment Highlights

Strong draw from the Emaar + Vida combination, waterfront positioning, and proximity to Downtown support rental demand and long-term appetite for branded stock in Dubai Creek Harbour.

Payment & Booking

Indicative launch structure (confirm with H&S): 10% on booking, 70% during construction (often across instalments), and 20% on handover—an 80/20-style plan. Starting from about AED 1.91M; handover targeted around Q3 2029, subject to construction progress.

faqs.answer: 1, 2 and 3-bedroom apartments under the Vida brand, including select 3-bedroom + maid configurations. Sizes span roughly 755 sq ft to 1,911 sq ft depending on typology.

faqs.question: Who is the developer of Montiva by Vida?
faqs.answer: Emaar Properties, with Vida as the branded residential operator—in Dubai Creek Harbour’s Green Gate District.

faqs.question: When will Montiva be handed over?
faqs.answer: Public timelines reference completion around Q3 2029; confirm the latest handover date with H&S as construction progresses.

faqs.question: What amenities are included in Montiva?
faqs.answer: Highlights include an infinity pool with sunset decks, children's splash zone, garden courtyards and zen gardens, fitness and yoga terraces, lounges and concierge-style leisure areas—plus proximity to parks and the marina.

description:
Launch Price

Fiori at Town Square Dubai by Nshama introduces an attainable entry into one of Dubai's most popular planned communities. Prices are competitive for buyers and investors. Payment plans are flexible. They suit first-time buyers and experienced investors. Register to receive today's launch availability, current offers, and exact unit pricing tailored to your preferred layout and view within Town Square Dubai.

  • 1-bedroom apartments: Starting from approximately AED 1,030,888
  • 2-bedroom apartments: Starting from approximately AED 1,399,888
  • Studio apartments: Starting from approximately 2,300,000
  • Developer: Nshama (Town Square Dubai master property developer)
  • Community: Town Square Dubai, near Al Qudra & Emirates Road
  • Product: Contemporary apartments with smart layouts
  • Status: Off plan project (developer-backed)
  • Target Handover: June 2028 (as per current guidance)
  • Ownership: Freehold
  • Lifestyle: Park-front, family-friendly community with central park, promenade access, and rich amenity palette

Project Highlights

Fiori blends modern architecture with neighbourhood warmth across a vibrant, walkable setting. Think central park mornings, an amenity design centred on well-being, and seamless links to dining, retail stores, schools and fitness. In direct vicinity of Arabian Ranches, Damac Hills and Studio City, the address balances calm suburbia with city convenience. Investors find strong rental demand in Town Square. Leading estate research platforms show rising interest. End-users use community facilities and enjoy them. These facilities set a high standard for affordable luxury living.

Architectural Design and Features

Fiori's language draws from geometric rhythms and clean lines, delivering light-filled interiors and efficient plans. The living spaces are airy. The kitchens are modern. The balconies are large. The builders choose materials that last long and are good for the environment. Façades echo Town Square's cohesive identity while allowing each building its own character. Inside, smart home features improve daily comfort. They also increase security and save energy.

Project Timeline And Delivery Details

Delivery Date

The targeted delivery date is June 2028, aligning with Nshama's phasing at Town Square Dubai. Buyers will receive periodic construction updates and notices on design revisions or building guides as milestones progress.

Number of Buildings

Fiori is part of the wider Town Square tapestry of low-rise apartment buildings and villa neighbourhoods. The cluster scale supports efficient community services, landscaped podiums, and convenient access to retail and parks.

Property Types

  • Studios for smart, low-maintenance living
  • 1-bedroom apartments ideal for professionals and couples
  • 2-bedroom apartments designed for young families

(Select buildings may release additional configurations subject to demand and original plans/initial concept designs.)

Project Timeline

  • Project announcement: Current release within Town Square's ongoing master plan
  • Expected Booking Date: On-going; check current availability
  • Construction Started: As per release phase schedule
  • Expected Completion: June 2028 (subject to authority approvals)
  • From Developers: Nshama – creator of Town Square's award-winning community landscape and amenity-led lifestyle

Apartment Floor Plans and Features

  • Studio: Efficient, open-plan living with balcony
  • 1 Bedroom: Comfortable living/dining, fitted kitchen, laundry niche
  • 2 Bedroom: Shared or ensuite bath options, larger balconies and storage

Exact areas vary by stack, orientation, and design revisions. Request the latest Master Plan and floor plates.

Studio Floor Plan

Optimized for singles and investors: open living/sleeping zone, fitted kitchen, and balcony, with select tiers offering park or boulevard outlooks.

One Bedroom Floor Plan

Smart zoning between living and sleeping areas, feature kitchens, linen/storage, and balconies sized for café seating. Ideal for rental searches thanks to efficient footprints.

Two Bedroom Floor Plan

Family-friendly proportions with ensuite options, dual balconies in select layouts, and flexible living for work-from-home or nursery needs.

Smart Home Features

Apartments are prepped for smart home integrations: app-based AC and lighting control, smart access at lobbies, and compatible systems for voice assistance. These features improve comfort, energy use, and security. They support Town Square's goals for environmental sustainability. They also support Town Square's goals for daily convenience.

Government Fees and Payment Plans

Government Fee 4%

Purchasers should account for the Dubai Land Department (DLD) fee – commonly 4% of the property value plus standard purchase conditions required by regulatory departments. Your partner agency/estate agent will guide you on all terms of performance and payments into the project Escrow.

Payment Plan

Nshama's flexible Payment Plan supports staged installments across construction, with the balance on completion. Talk to your real estate agent or partner agency. They can give you the current schedule, eligibility, and financing options. Investors benefit from clear processes. The government inspects these processes. Escrow accounts provide oversight.

Location & Nearby Attractions

Town Square sits along Al Qudra with quick access to Emirates Road, connecting to city hotspots and employment hubs. Nearby:

  • Arabian Ranches & Damac Hills (golf, dining, community centres)
  • Trump International Golf Club
  • Dubai British School Mira, Jebel Ali School, Fairgreen International School, Ranches Primary School
  • Desert cycling tracks on Al Qudra
  • Retail, cafés, and weekend markets within Town Square's promenade access

Within a broader drive-time radius: Downtown Dubai, Business Bay, Dubai Hills Estate, Dubai Marina, and Dubai International Airport (DXB).

Amenities

The amenity palette has been thoughtfully curated for daily life:

  • Green courtyards & hectares of parkland in the wider community
  • Fitness rooms, jogging & cycling trails
  • Vibrant kids' play areas and family zones
  • Outdoor pools, shaded seating, multi-sport courts
  • On-site retail, cafés and essential services
  • Community events and markets supporting neighbourhood life

Nearby Hotels

For guests and weekend staycations, residents have plenty of hotels within a short drive, including Radisson Dubai (Damac Hills) and options around Arabian Ranches, Dubai Hills Estate, and Motor City.

Local Schools

Top schools in the catchment and nearby include:

  • Dubai British School Mira
  • Jebel Ali School
  • Ranches Primary School
  • Fairgreen International School

Nursery and early learning options are also available within and around Town Square.

Nearby Neighbourhoods Community

  • Arabian Ranches (opulent villas, mature landscaping)
  • Damac Hills (golf clubs, leisure)
  • Studio City (production centre, media employment base)
  • Dubai Hills Estate and Motor City (shopping, clinics, sports)

Location and Connectivity (Roads & Highway)

  • Direct links to Al Qudra and Emirates Road.
  • Faster commutes to Downtown Dubai, Business Bay, Dubai Hills Estate, Motor City, and Studio City.
  • Public transport options and community shuttles support car-light living.
  • Cycling paths and landscaped walkways promote wellness and daily activity.
  • Retail stores, clinics, and schools reachable within minutes.
  • All essentials nearby, supporting a complete, self-contained housing community.

Things to Do

  • Stroll, picnic, or relax in Town Square's central park.
  • Cool off at splash zones and enjoy green promenades.
  • Hit the skate areas and outdoor fitness spots.
  • Play a round at nearby golf clubs (Arabian Ranches, Damac Hills).
  • Go desert cycling at Al Qudra tracks.
  • Explore dining clusters across Arabian Ranches and Damac Hills.
  • Join community events, markets, and pop-ups year-round.
  • Drive to major malls and city attractions within minutes.

Security System

Town Square buildings adopt a layered approach: lobby access control, monitored CCTV cameras, fire & life-safety systems aligned to Dubai codes, and professional facilities management. Community patrols and trained personnel help maintain a safe, family-first environment.

Why Fiori Town Square?

For end-users, it's the blend of parks, schools, everyday retail and a calm, gated community feel. Investors find good entry prices, growing infrastructure, and steady demand. These factors make the investment attractive. In short: Fiori Town Square Location equals lifestyle today and resilience tomorrow.

MJL Nourelle Residences offers a rare chance to own a premium apartment. The community is gated and has a resort style. Meraas Holding built it. This company is known for innovation and quality. Key Information

Project Highlights

MJL Nourelle Residences is a gated residential development within the sought-after Madinat Jumeirah Living District. The project mixes Arabian tradition with modern design. It offers a community that honors both culture and modern living. The property has landscaped courtyards and water features. It also includes fitness facilities, private gyms, and children's play areas. There are leisure resorts with great views of the Burj Al Arab and Jumeirah skyline.

Architectural Design and Features

The architecture at MJL Nourelle showcases the perfect fusion of American architecture and Arabic aesthetics. Every detail – from the arched facades to modern interiors – is designed to reflect Dubai's blend of heritage and innovation. The apartments have modern kitchens. They have elegant interiors, floor-to-ceiling windows, and high-end finishes. Communal lounges and landscaped gardens improve the community feeling. Pedestrian-friendly paths connect residents to all parts of the district.

Project Timeline And Delivery

Delivery Date

Expected handover is set for Q4 2027, aligning with Meraas' commitment to timely delivery and top-tier construction standards.

Number of Buildings

Apartment Floor Plans

MJL Nourelle Residences by Meraas offers a selection of thoughtfully designed floor plans to suit every lifestyle. The studio apartments feature open-concept layouts with efficient space planning, elegant interiors, and premium finishes - perfect for young professionals or investors. The one-bedroom apartments are ideal for couples, offering spacious living areas, private balconies, and modern kitchens with sleek detailing and natural light. The two-bedroom apartments offer great comfort and function. They have luxury finishes, large balconies, and beautiful views of the Burj Al Arab and the Jumeirah skyline. Each layout focuses on flow, comfort, and style. It mixes modern design with Arabian-inspired elegance. These homes show both charm and sophistication in Dubai's prestigious Madinat Jumeirah Living community.

Property Types

  • Studio Apartments
  • 1-Bedroom Apartments
  • 2-Bedroom Apartments

Each unit type is carefully designed to provide maximum living space, modern design, and comfortable layouts suitable for singles, couples, and small families.

Government Fee (4%)

Project Timeline

From Developer: Meraas Holding – known for luxury projects like City Walk Crestlane, Bulgari Marina Lofts, and Verve City Walk.

Payment Plan

MJL Nourelle offers flexible payment plans suitable for investors and end-users alike. Buyers can use attractive installment plans during construction. This makes it a smart and affordable investment in Dubai's luxury property market.

Location & Nearby Attractions

Situated in the heart of Madinat Jumeirah Living, MJL Nourelle Residences offers direct access to Dubai's key landmarks and destinations:

  • Burj Al Arab – 3 minutes

Residents can also enjoy nearby attractions such as Jumeirah Beach Road, Jumeirah Street, and Al Wasl Road, making every commute convenient.

Amenities

MJL Nourelle Residences redefines modern comfort with a range of high-end facilities, including:

MJL Nourelle Residences at Madinat Jumeirah Living offers seamless connectivity across Dubai through major highways and arterial routes. The community is near Sheikh Zayed Road, Umm Suqeim Road, and Jumeirah Beach Road. This location allows quick access to Dubai Internet City, Business Bay, Downtown Dubai, and Dubai Marina. All these places are within a 15 to 20-minute drive. Residents live close to DXB International Airport. This location is convenient for frequent travelers and investors. The gated development is pedestrian-friendly with easy links to nearby public transport, leisure hubs, and shopping districts. Whether commuting for work or leisure, MJL Nourelle provides a central location with effortless access to Dubai's most vibrant neighborhoods and attractions.

Things to Do Near MJL Nourelle Residences

Living at MJL Nourelle means having Dubai's vibrant lifestyle at your doorstep:

  • Dine at Burj Al Arab's fine restaurants or enjoy outdoor walks along the pedestrian pathways.

  • Stay active with fitness centres, bike tracks, and leisure resorts nearby.

Investment Opportunity

MJL Nourelle Residences offers a rare chance to own a premium apartment in one of Dubai's most exclusive communities. With its prime location, world-class amenities, and the reputation of Meraas Holding, this development presents an excellent opportunity for both investors and end-users seeking luxury living in Dubai.

description:
Emaar Properties PJSC develops Terra Gardens at Expo Living. It is a new off-plan real estate project within the Expo City Dubai master community. This project shows Emaar's style of creating luxury apartments and ultra-luxury homes. These homes have modern design. They also focus on sustainability. They offer lifestyle convenience. Residents have direct access to Sheikh Zayed Road, Dubai Marina, and Downtown Dubai. They are minutes away from places like the Burj Khalifa, The Dubai Mall, and Dubai Hills Mall.

The development has 1, 2 and 3 bedroom apartments. It also has 3 bedroom townhouses. All homes balance unique architecture with peaceful living spaces. Every home is equipped with smart-home features, ensuring an urban style that promotes comfort and convenience.

PROJECT HIGHLIGHTS

  • Developed by Emaar Properties, a global leader in real estate development and creator of iconic communities like Dubai Hills Estate, Arabian Ranches, and Dubai Creek Harbour.
  • Located in Expo Living, a sustainable sub-community within Expo City Dubai part of the Dubai South Village.
  • Offers luxury apartments and townhouses with views of lush landscapes, echoing Emaar's Equestrian Legacy and Grandeur Estate Living concepts.
  • Inspired by the theme of Idyllic Luxury and Serene Haven of Branded Living, integrating nature and innovation.
  • Residents can enjoy proximity to Dubai Marina Mall, Gold and Diamond Park, The Greens Souk, The Ranches Souk, and The Valley Pavilion – each a signature retail destination curated by Emaar Communities.
  • Attractive off-plan property investment opportunity with potential for a Golden Visa and strong returns in Dubai's thriving real estate market.

    • Architectural Design and Features

    The architecture showcases clean lines, natural materials, and floor-to-ceiling glass facades that maximize light and views. Terra Gardens shows world-class interiors and unique architecture. It is influenced by global design icons like Christian Louboutin, Gabrielle Chanel, Harry Winston, and Laurence Graff OBE.

    Spacious living spaces flow seamlessly into terraces and balconies overlooking green courtyards. These modern homes reflect Emaar's urban style and House of Cartier-like sophistication - elegant, enduring, and artful.

    Terra Gardens Expected Completion Date

    Expected completion: Q4 2029.

    Emaar follows a careful timeline to deliver projects on schedule. They keep high quality without compromise. This is true for developments like Dubai Hills Estate, Mina Rashid, and Address Residences Zabeel.

    Number of Buildings

    Terra Gardens has several mid-rise residential buildings. It also has low-density townhouse clusters. Together, they create a balanced and pedestrian-friendly community within Expo Living.

    Terra Gardens Property Types and Craftsmanship

    1 Bedroom Apartments (742–866 sq ft)
    2 Bedroom Apartments (1,111–1,233 sq ft)
    3 Bedroom Apartments (1,665–1,676 sq ft)
    3 Bedroom Townhouses (2,580–2,702 sq ft)
    Each home reflects Emaar's craftsmanship, like its earlier landmarks in Emirates Living and The Meadows Village.

    Government Fee 4%

    Buyers must pay a 4% Dubai Land Department registration fee. This fee follows building rules for off-plan developments in Dubai.

    Emaar Project Launch Supporting Dubai's Sustainable Growth

    Mohamed Alabbar, Chairman of Emaar Properties, publicly launched the project. This supports Dubai's vision for sustainable residential growth.
    Expected Booking Date: Bookings are open now for early investors, with flexible 80/20 payment plans.
    Construction has started. Workers began pre-construction work as part of Expo City's Dh100 billion regeneration masterplan.
    Expected Completion: October 2029.
    From Developers: Emaar Properties PJSC – supported by Investment Corporation of Dubai and Dubai Holding.

    Layout Type & Size (sqft)

    Varied layouts allow buyers to select their preferred size. Smart, open layouts improve cross-ventilation and daylight. They also allow smooth indoor-outdoor transitions. These features suit both investors and end-users.

    Location & Nearby Attractions

    The project is in Expo Living. It is close to Sheikh Zayed Road, Dubai Internet City, Abbas Ibn Firnas Square, and Al Qasr Al Ghamedh.

    Nearby Attractions:
    Expo City Dubai Pavilion and CAPTCHA Expo Living complex
    Dubai Hills Golf Estate and Grand Polo Club & Resort
    Creek Beach, Rashid Yachts & Marina, and Creek Edge Waterfront Villas
    Beach Isle Villas, Dubai Creek Residences, and Lyvia By Palace at Dubai Creek Harbour
    These landmarks reinforce Emaar's leadership in mixed-use waterfront developments.

    Amenities

  • Resort-style pools and sun decks
  • Fully equipped gym, padel courts, and championship golf course nearby
  • Yoga lawns, meditation zones, and wellness gardens
  • Kids' play areas and family parks
  • Retail and dining at Souk Al Bahar and The Dubai Mall just a short drive away
  • 24-hour concierge and security

    • Nearby Emaar-Managed Hotels and Resorts

    Emaar Hospitality Group and Address Hotels & Resorts manage famous hotels near the project. These include Address Residences Dubai Opera, Vida Downtown, and Address Residences Zabeel. Residents can enjoy world-class leisure within minutes.

    Top Local Schools for Residents and Expats

    Nearby schools include Greenfield International School, Dubai British School, and The Arbor School. They provide top education for residents and expats who want long-term residence visas.

    Nearby Neighbourhoods / Community

    Terra Gardens connects easily to Arabian Ranches 3, The Valley, Dubai Hills Estate, and Emaar South Village. These areas form part of Emaar Communities' growing lifestyle destinations.

    LOCATION AND CONNECTIVITY (Roads and Highway)

  • Direct access to Sheikh Zayed Road, Emirates Road, and Mohammed bin Zayed Road
  • 10 minutes from Al Maktoum International Airport, 20 minutes to Dubai Marina, and 30 minutes to Downtown Dubai
  • Easy metro connection via Expo 2020 Station, linking to Dubai Creek Harbour and Business Bay

    • Things to Do

    Residents can walk through Expo City Dubai's green corridors. They can shop at The Dubai Mall. They can enjoy fine dining at Souk Al Bahar. Dubai's best attractions are close by.

    Nearby beaches, parks, and leisure hubs like Palm Jumeirah, Ras Al Khaimah, and Mina Rashid offer endless recreational possibilities.
