description:
Portside Square by Ellington Properties is an exclusive waterfront residential community located in the heart of Mina Rashid, one of Dubai’s most iconic maritime destinations. Blending modern architecture, maritime heritage, and contemporary living, Portside Square offers a refined coastal lifestyle surrounded by the tranquil charm of the Arabian Gulf.

Ownership and Registration Fees

The landmark development Portside Square offers freehold ownership in Dubai’s lively waterfront district. The government fee of 4% applies to property registration, aligning with UAE standard practices.

Portside Square Project Features and Location

Portside Square is a premium real-estate project located at Mina Rashid, Dubai, by Ellington Properties. It is conceived as a trio of high-rise towers, combining design-led architecture, waterfront leisure and marina living.

Architectural Design and Features

  • The buildings have wave-inspired façades.
  • They also have floor-to-ceiling windows.
  • These features maximize views of the marina, sea, and city skyline.
  • The interiors are elegant and have maritime themes.
  • They include curved balconies, natural textures, and smart-home features.

Portside Square Scheduled Delivery Date

The scheduled handover (delivery) of Portside Square is in Q4 2029.

Number of Buildings

The development comprises three residential towers (Portside Residences I, II & III).

Available Apartment Types and Features

The units include studios, 1-bedroom, 2-bedroom (+ study in some cases), 3-bedroom apartments and ultra-premium 4-bedroom penthouses.

Government Fee

Buyers should note the typical UAE government registration fee of 4% when purchasing property in Dubai.

Portside Square Project Timeline and Developer Info

  • Project Announcement / Expected Booking Date: The project has been actively marketed with bookings available; details of the exact announcement date are not publicly specified.
  • Construction Started: Construction is underway in Mina Rashid precise start date not widely publicised.
  • Expected Completion: Hand-over is scheduled for Q4 2029.
  • From Developers: Developed by Ellington Properties, known in Dubai for design-led residential projects.

Layout Type / Size (sq.ft)

  • Studio units: approx. 395 sq ft to 454 sq ft.
  • 1-bedroom: approx. 767 sq ft to 915 sq ft.
  • 2-bedroom: approx. 1,173 sq ft to 1,377 sq ft.
  • 2-bedroom + Study: approx. 1,370 sq ft to 1,533 sq ft.
  • 3-bedroom: approx. 1,724 sq ft to 1,874 sq ft.
  • 4-bedroom penthouses: from approx. 3,441 sq ft.

Smart Home and Security Systems at Portside Square

Portside Square has smart-home and security systems. These include home automation, integrated security, and smart lighting. These features match those in luxury waterfront developments in Dubai.

Location & Nearby Attractions

Portside Square is in Mina Rashid, also known as Port Rashid. This is a waterfront district with a rich maritime history.

  • Nearby Attractions: Marina promenades, yacht marina and promenade lifestyle.
  • Quick connectivity: 1 min to the iconic QE2, 6 mins to Sheikh Zayed Road, 10 mins to Downtown/Dubai Mall.
  • Sea-views of the Arabian Gulf and marina side landscapes.
  • Close to major hubs like Dubai Marina, Al Maktoum Airport (DWC) and Dubai International Airport (DXB).

Lifestyle and Wellness Amenities at Portside Square

Residents of Portside Square will have many lifestyle and wellness amenities.

  • Infinity pool and kids' pool.
  • Landscaped outdoor terraces, jogging/cycling paths along the marina.
  • Fitness studio, yoga & pilates zones, wellness spa.
  • Co-working lounges, dining clubhouses, cinema lounges and kids' play areas.
  • EV charging stations and private parking for many units.
  • Waterfront retail and lifestyle pavilion-style amenities.

Nearby Hotels & Local Schools

Mina Rashid is a waterfront area that is growing. It is close to premium hotels, yacht clubs, and leisure venues. Local schools and communities are growing with the district's masterplan. This growth offers opportunities for families.

Nearby Neighbourhoods & Community

Mina Rashid is connected to Dubai Marina, Palm Jumeirah, Downtown Dubai and the wider Dubai South region. The new residential community will have marina promenades. It will also offer waterfront living. It will offer a peaceful lifestyle with connections to the city.

Location and Connectivity: Roads & Highways

Portside Square is located in Mina Rashid. It provides excellent connectivity.

  • Direct access to Sheikh Zayed Road, one of Dubai's major arteries.
  • Close to Dubai International Airport (DXB) and Dubai South/Al Maktoum International Airport (DWC) for air-travel connectivity.
  • Proximity to the marina promenade and waterfront boardwalks for cycling and walking.
  • This ensures both ease of commuting and high lifestyle convenience.

Things to Do

Residents can enjoy a variety of leisure and lifestyle experiences:

  • Marina-side promenade walks and yacht-watching.
  • Swimming in the infinity pool or kids pool.
  • Using co-working pods and lounges for work/leisure.
  • Enjoying high-end dining, retail and café culture by the waterfront.
  • Fitness studio, wellness areas (yoga/pilates), EV charging, community events in landscaped spaces.

faqs.question: What is Portside Square by Ellington Properties?
faqs.answer: Portside Square is a luxury waterfront residential development by Ellington Properties located in Mina Rashid, Dubai. It features three design-led high-rise towers offering studios to 4-bedroom penthouses, inspired by Dubai's maritime heritage and contemporary architecture.

faqs.question: Where is Portside Square located?
faqs.answer: Portside Square is strategically located in Mina Rashid (Port Rashid), near Sheikh Zayed Road, Dubai Marina, and Downtown Dubai. It offers easy access to Dubai International Airport, Al Maktoum International Airport, and key destinations like Expo City and Infinity Bridge Road.

faqs.question: Who is the developer of Portside Square?
faqs.answer: The project is developed by Ellington Properties, one of Dubai's top luxury real estate developers, known for high-quality design and craftsmanship across projects like The Quayside, Ocean House, and Mercer House.

faqs.question: What types of properties are available at Portside Square?
faqs.answer: The development offers a wide range of Luxury Apartments including: Studios (from approx. 395 sq.ft), 1-bedroom apartments, 2-bedroom apartments (with and without study), 3-bedroom apartments, and 4-bedroom penthouses with waterfront views. All units are equipped with Smart Home and Security Systems for a modern lifestyle.

faqs.question: What are the key amenities offered at Portside Square?
faqs.answer: Residents enjoy a world-class selection of amenities, including: Infinity Pool & Kids Pool, Fitness Studio, Yoga & Pilates Studio, Co-working Pods & Lounges, Wellness Areas & The Quiet Deck, EV Charging Stations and Private Parking, Bicycle Parking, Drop-off Area, and Retail Outlets, Waterfront Leisure Decks and Lifestyle Pavilion.

faqs.question: What is the starting price for apartments at Portside Square?
faqs.answer: Prices at Portside Square start from approximately AED 1,300,000 for a studio apartment, with premium 4-bedroom penthouses priced up to AED 2.3M+ depending on size, layout, and view.

faqs.question: When is the expected completion or handover date?
faqs.answer: The expected completion date for Portside Square is Q4 2029, with construction already underway.

faqs.question: Is there a post-handover payment plan available?
faqs.answer: Yes, Ellington offers an attractive post-handover payment plan for investors and end-users, making ownership more flexible and convenient.

faqs.question: What makes Portside Square a good investment in Dubai?
faqs.answer: Portside Square stands out for its prime waterfront location, modern architecture, and strong investment returns potential. Being part of Dubai Mina Rashid's redevelopment, it benefits from proximity to the cruise terminal, yachting facilities, and major roads - ensuring high rental yields and long-term appreciation.

faqs.question: What nearby attractions and facilities are available?
faqs.answer: Nearby attractions include: The Lighthouse, Marina Promenade, and Yacht Club, Dubai Marina (15 minutes), Downtown Dubai (10 minutes), Dubai International Airport (20 minutes). World-class dining, retail outlets, and waterfront sculpture designs add to the area's vibrant lifestyle.

faqs.question: Are the apartments equipped with smart home technology?
faqs.answer: Yes, all residences feature Smart Home Technology - including smart lighting, temperature control, and advanced security systems for seamless, energy-efficient living.

faqs.question: Is Portside Square suitable for families?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. The community includes kids' play zones, family pools, co-working lounges, local schools nearby, and secure green spaces, making it ideal for family-friendly waterfront living.

faqs.question: How tall are the towers at Portside Square?
faqs.answer: Each tower in Portside Square is a G + P + 16 (plus roof) structure, designed with elegant façade lighting, landscaped outdoor areas, and panoramic open-sea views.

faqs.question: What transportation options and connectivity are available?
faqs.answer: The project connects directly to Sheikh Zayed Road, Infinity Bridge, and Port Rashid Marina. Residents can easily reach Dubai International Airport, Dubai South, and Al Maktoum International Airport within 15–25 minutes.

faqs.question: Can foreigners buy apartments at Portside Square?
faqs.answer: Yes, Portside Square offers freehold ownership, allowing foreign investors and residents to purchase and fully own their property in Dubai.

faqs.question: What lifestyle can residents expect at Portside Square?
faqs.answer: Residents enjoy a balanced mix of modern architecture, waterfront leisure, and contemporary living. Whether it's relaxing by the infinity pool, working from co-working lounges, or enjoying aqua cycling and yachting facilities, every aspect is crafted for elevated urban living by the sea.

title: Palm Jebel Ali
fullTitle: Palm Jebel Ali Villas by Nakheel - Dubai

highlights.title: Ultra-Luxury Waterfront
highlights.description: Premium beachfront villas with private beach access, infinity pools, and panoramic Arabian Gulf views.

highlights.title: Iconic Palm Island
highlights.description: Part of the famous Palm Islands trilogy, nearly twice the size of Palm Jumeirah with exclusive coastal living.

highlights.title: World-Class Architecture
highlights.description: Designed by Whitespace Architects, NAGA Architects, and LW Design Group with modern elegance.

highlights.title: Smart Home Technology
highlights.description: Automated lighting, air-conditioning, biometric entry, and centralized control through My Nakheel App.

highlights.title: Resort-Style Amenities
highlights.description: Private beachfront access, resort-style clubhouses, health centers, retail, and fine-dining avenues.

highlights.title: Golden Visa Eligible
highlights.description: Freehold ownership eligible for UAE Golden Visa, offering long-term residency benefits.

description:
Nakheel Properties' Palm Jebel Ali Villas offer ultra-luxury coastal living in Dubai. The project is part of the famous Palm Islands trilogy. It is designed as an architectural marvel. The villas are surrounded by the Arabian Gulf's sparkling waters. It offers a special group of Beach Villas and Coral Villas. These villas have private beachfront access and resort-style amenities. They also have excellent connections via Sheikh Zayed Road (E11).

PROJECT HIGHLIGHTS

  • Developer: Nakheel Properties
  • Architects: Whitespace Architects, NAGA Architects, LW Design Group
  • Project Type: Premium, luxury beachfront villas
  • Property Ownership: Freehold property (eligible for UAE Golden Visa)
  • Location: Palm Jebel Ali, near Jebel Ali Free Zone and Expo City Dubai
  • Accessibility: Via Sheikh Zayed Road, near Dubai Metro and Dubai Waterfront Metro
  • Nearby Airports: Al Maktoum International Airport (15 mins) and Dubai International Airport (35 mins)
  • Lifestyle: Waterfront promenades, infinity pools, walkable streets, and pocketed parks

Starting Prices

  • The Beach Collection Villas: from AED 18 million
  • The Coral Collection Villas: from AED 23 million
  • Premium Signature Villas: from AED 28 million +

Palm Jebel Ali Villas Expected Completion Date

The Palm Jebel Ali Villas by Nakheel are scheduled for completion in the fourth quarter of 2027. The Dubai 2040 Urban Master Plan includes this timeline. The plan aims to build communities that are sustainable and ready for the future. It covers the whole city. The project uses modern infrastructure. It uses smart home technology. It follows eco-friendly building standards. The completion date makes Palm Jebel Ali one of Dubai's most awaited developments. It gives residents and investors a great chance to enjoy luxury waterfront living. The setting is lively and sustainable.

Project Timeline

StageDetails
Project AnnouncementAnnounced by Nakheel Properties under Khalid Al Malik's vision
Expected Booking DateOngoing since 2024
Construction StartedEarly 2025
Expected CompletionQ4 2027

Number of Buildings

Palm Jebel Ali will have more than 80 luxury villas. These villas belong to The Beach Collection and The Coral Collection. They are designed for premium buyers and investors who want exclusive waterfront homes.

Palm Jebel Ali Villas Property Types and Amenities

  • Coral Villas -- 6- & 7-bedroom units
  • Beach Villas -- 5- & 6-bedroom options
  • Premium Villas -- Bespoke designs like Azure Blue Villa, Cranberry Sky Villa, and Ruby Sunset Villa

All homes have private beachfront access. They have wide sea views and resort-style facilities.

Off-Plan Payment Plans With Escrow Protection

Nakheel Properties offers flexible and attractive off-plan payment plans for buyers of Palm Jebel Ali Villas. Buyers make payments in easy installments linked to construction milestones. They pay the remaining balance when they receive the property. Escrow accounts protect all transactions. This ensures safety and transparency for investors. Upon completion, buyers receive a Title Deed registered with the Dubai Land Department. Property owners can also qualify for the Dubai Golden Visa. This visa gives long-term residency benefits. H&S Real Estate guides clients fully. They help with secure payments, paperwork, and eligibility. This makes buying easy and smooth.

Government Fee -- 4%

The Dubai Land Department charges a 4% registration fee. This fee is standard for off-plan properties under Escrow Law No. 8 of 2007. It ensures payment protection and transparency.

From Developers

At H&S Real Estate, we proudly present the Palm Jebel Ali Villas by Nakheel. This is the latest gem in Dubai's prestigious luxury waterfront portfolio. Nakheel Properties developed this project. They also created Palm Jumeirah, Dubai Islands, and The World Islands. This project starts a new era of very exclusive and sustainable coastal living. Every villa has modern architecture. They have high-quality finishes. They include resort-style amenities. Investors can explore verified listings through H&S Real Estate. They can also secure bookings and enjoy a smooth property-buying experience backed by Nakheel's trusted legacy.

Apartment Floor Plans

Studio Floor Plan

Nakheel designed the studio residences at Palm Jebel Ali Villas for modern minimalists. These residents value style, comfort, and functionality. Each unit has an open-plan layout that combines living, dining, and sleeping areas. This design creates a spacious feeling. Natural light and sea views enhance this space. Large balconies let residents enjoy the calm coastal breeze. Premium finishes show the elegance of Nakheel's craftsmanship. These studios are ideal for young professionals, short-term residents, or investors. They want high rental returns in Dubai's luxury waterfront community. They offer great value and timeless design.

One-Bedroom Floor Plan

The one-bedroom homes at Palm Jebel Ali Villas by Nakheel are smartly designed. They combine elegance, comfort, and usefulness. Each home features a spacious living room that opens onto a private balcony with serene water views, creating a bright and airy atmosphere. The open kitchen layout is thoughtfully planned with premium finishes and modern appliances, ideal for stylish urban living. With generous storage, a luxurious master suite, and seamless indoor-outdoor flow, these units are perfect for professionals or couples seeking a sophisticated coastal retreat within one of Dubai's most exclusive waterfront destinations.

Two-Bedroom Floor Plan

The two-bedroom residences at Palm Jebel Ali Villas by Nakheel offer the perfect blend of luxury, comfort, and practicality. Each unit has two large en-suite bedrooms. Modern interiors include premium finishes and elegant details. Large sea-facing terraces provide breathtaking views of the Arabian Gulf. Open-plan living and dining areas create a smooth flow of space. This setup is ideal for family gatherings. These homes are perfect for small families or couples who want a refined coastal lifestyle. They provide exclusivity. They also provide usefulness. They offer a fancy living experience in one of Dubai's most prestigious waterfront communities.

Layout Type & Size (sq ft)

  • Beach Villas: 6,000 -- 7,000 sq ft
  • Coral Villas: 7,500 -- 8,500 sq ft
  • Premium Villas: 9,000 + sq ft

Each villa features expansive terraces, multi-car garages, and private pools.

Smart Home Features

  • Automated lighting, air-conditioning, and curtain systems
  • Keyless biometric entry
  • Centralized control through My Nakheel App
  • Real-time service requests and secure payments

Architectural Design and Features

Each villa at Palm Jebel Ali is a masterpiece of modern architecture, inspired by the natural fluidity and rhythm of the sea. World-famous firms Whitespace Architects, NAGA Architects, and LW Design Group designed the project together. They combined artistic vision with modern elegance. The villas feature sleek lines, open layouts, and floor-to-ceiling glass façades that fill the interiors with natural light and panoramic sea views. The design mixes simplicity with grandeur. It creates a calm atmosphere that shows Dubai's coastal charm. Residents live a refined lifestyle. They enjoy luxury, space, and sophistication.

Highlights include:

  • Private infinity pools overlooking the Arabian Gulf
  • Private gardens with tropical landscaping
  • Floor-to-ceiling glass façades maximizing natural light
  • Luxury finishes using imported materials
  • Smart home automation powered by My Nakheel App

Location & Nearby Attractions

Palm Jebel Ali is in a prime spot between Mina Jebel Ali and Dubai Marina. It connects easily through Sheikh Zayed Road (E11). The community is just minutes from Expo City Dubai, Dubai Parks and Resorts, Motiongate Dubai, and Legoland Dubai. It offers endless entertainment for families. Residents can easily reach key business areas, luxury hotels, and leisure spots. They can enjoy both peace and convenience. Palm Jebel Ali is surrounded by clean beaches, waterfront promenades, and world-class attractions. It offers a perfect balance between lively city life and peaceful coastal living. It is an ideal place for families and investors.

Nearby attractions include the following.

  • Dubai Marina Mall
  • Bluewaters Island
  • Crystal Lagoon Waterfront Promenades
  • Luxury Hotels like Rixos Hotels & Residences

Amenities

  • Private beachfront access
  • Resort-style clubhouses
  • Infinity pools
  • Health and wellbeing centers
  • Retail and fine-dining avenues
  • Jogging tracks, cycling lanes, and pocketed parks
  • 24/7 security and concierge services

Nearby Hotels

  • Rixos Hotels & Residences -- Ultra-luxury hospitality
  • Blue Horizon Hotel -- Seaside comfort
  • Bay Villas Hotel -- Boutique stay experience
  • Como Residences Dubai -- Signature luxury tower

Nearby International Schools Offering IB and British Curriculums

  • GEMS Wellington International School
  • GEMS World Academy
  • Al Ghaf Private School

Families benefit from living near international schools that offer IB and British programs.

Nearby Neighbourhoods & Communities

  • Jumeirah Lake Towers (JLT)
  • Dubai Marina
  • Dubai Islands
  • Dubai Healthcare City
  • District One West
  • Bay Grove Residences

All within 20--30 minutes via Sheikh Zayed Road and the Dubai Metro.

Location & Connectivity (Roads & Highways)

Palm Jebel Ali offers excellent connections across Dubai and beyond:

  • Direct access to Sheikh Zayed Road (E11)
  • Ideally located between Abu Dhabi and Dubai Downtown
  • Easy access to major highways and upcoming transport routes
  • Connected to the Dubai Waterfront Metro Extension (planned)
  • Life Pharmacy Metro Station -- nearest metro access
  • Al Maktoum International Airport -- approximately 15 minutes away
  • Close to Expo City Dubai and Dubai Marina
  • Short driving distance to key landmarks across the emirate

Things to Do

Residents can indulge in:

  • Waterfront dining & yachting
  • Strolls along walkable streets
  • Water sports and kayaking
  • Shopping at luxury retail centers
  • Wellness retreats and spa days

Dubai Parks and Resorts nearby offers family fun with Legoland, Motiongate, and Bollywood Parks Dubai.

Investment Benefits of Palm Jebel Ali Development

Palm Jebel Ali fits well with the Dubai Economic Agenda D33. This plan focuses on making Dubai a top global center for investment and innovation. This development aims to increase long-term property value and rental income. It offers investors a safe and future-ready chance. Palm Jebel Ali is similar in size and exclusivity to Palm Jumeirah. The project introduces new urban planning with modern upgrades. It includes smart infrastructure and features that focus on sustainability. Dubai is growing quickly in its economy. Properties in Palm Jebel Ali are expected to increase in value. They will also keep their appeal in the market.

Pros:

  • Prime Waterfront Location: Palm Jebel Ali Villas offer stunning views and direct access to beautiful beaches, providing a luxurious and serene living environment.
  • Exclusive Community: These villas are part of a prestigious, high-end community with top-notch amenities such as private pools, gyms, and recreational facilities.
  • Modern Architectural Design: The villas boast contemporary designs with high-quality finishes, ensuring a stylish and comfortable living space.
  • Investment Potential: Properties in Palm Jebel Ali are likely to appreciate over time due to their desirable location and the growth of Dubai's real estate market.
  • Access to Dubai's Attractions: The strategic location provides easy access to shopping malls, fine dining restaurants, entertainment hubs, and other attractions in Dubai.

Cons:

  • High Cost: Luxury villas on Palm Jebel Ali are expensive, both in terms of purchase price and maintenance.
  • Limited Availability: Being an exclusive community, there may be limited options and availability when it comes to purchasing a villa.
  • Ongoing Development: As the area continues to develop, residents might experience construction noise and activity.
  • Distance from City Center: While the location is scenic, it might be farther from the central business districts or schools, potentially increasing travel times.
  • Potential Market Fluctuations: Like all real estate investments, there's a risk of market changes impacting property value.

Dubai 2040 Urban Master Plan Sustainability Vision

Part of the Dubai 2040 Urban Master Plan, the project integrates:

  • Solar panels
  • Energy-efficient materials
  • Water recycling
  • Green mobility infrastructure

faqs.question: What is the payment plan for Palm Jebel Ali?
faqs.answer: Nakheel offers a flexible off-plan payment plan to make ownership accessible. Buyers usually pay 20% at booking, followed by instalments during construction, and the final 20% on handover. All payments are made through Escrow accounts, ensuring complete safety and transparency.

faqs.question: Who is the owner of Palm Jebel Ali?
faqs.answer: Nakheel Properties, one of Dubai's most prestigious government-owned developers, is the master developer of Palm Jebel Ali. The company is best known for creating Palm Jumeirah, Dubai Islands, and The World Islands, shaping Dubai's global image as a luxury destination.

faqs.question: What is the starting price of Palm Jebel Ali villas?
faqs.answer: The starting price for villas at Palm Jebel Ali is approximately AED 18 million. Prices vary depending on the villa type, layout, and location along the island's fronds.

faqs.question: How many villas are there in Palm Jebel Ali?
faqs.answer: The Palm Jebel Ali master plan includes around 2,000 luxury villas across distinct collections such as The Beach Collection and The Coral Collection. Each villa offers unique designs, private gardens, and direct beachfront access.

faqs.question: How many houses are on the Palm Jebel Ali?
faqs.answer: In total, Palm Jebel Ali will accommodate thousands of residential units, including villas and future apartment communities. The project is designed to house tens of thousands of residents, blending luxury living with sustainable design.

faqs.question: Is Palm Jebel Ali bigger than Palm Jumeirah?
faqs.answer: Yes - Palm Jebel Ali is nearly twice the size of Palm Jumeirah. Covering about 13.4 square kilometres, it offers more beaches, wider fronds, and greater land area for villas and amenities.

faqs.question: Will Palm Jebel Ali ever be finished?
faqs.answer: Yes - the project is under active development, with construction milestones already underway. Nakheel aims to complete the villas and major infrastructure by Q4 2027, making Palm Jebel Ali a key part of the Dubai 2040 Urban Master Plan.

faqs.question: Why Invest in Palm Jebel Ali Villas?
faqs.answer: Investing in Palm Jebel Ali means joining Dubai's most promising real-estate destination. With freehold ownership, Golden Visa eligibility, and a limited number of ultra-luxury beachfront villas, the island offers both long-term value and lifestyle benefits. Its scale, design, and developer reputation make it an ideal choice for global investors seeking capital growth and steady rental yields.

faqs.question: Lifestyle and Amenities
faqs.answer: Residents of Palm Jebel Ali will enjoy private beaches, infinity pools, coastal parks, and walkable promenades lined with fine dining and retail options. The community integrates wellness zones, smart-home technology, and resort-style facilities, all designed to elevate the standards of waterfront living in Dubai.

title: Damac Riverside Views
fullTitle: Damac Riverside Views at Dubai Investment Park by DAMAC

highlights.title: Wellness-Driven Living
highlights.description: Artificial riverfronts, eco-friendly design, and nature-inspired architecture with hydroponic farms and wellness zones.

highlights.title: Unique Amenity Corridors
highlights.description: Green Vein and Water Vein corridors with floating sports zones, Zen spas, floating cinemas, and themed dining.

highlights.title: Mediterranean Design
highlights.description: Architecture inspired by Mediterranean coastal towns with natural hues, smart layouts, and floor-to-ceiling glass walls.

highlights.title: Prime DIP Location
highlights.description: Located in Dubai Investment Park, close to Expo City Dubai and Al Maktoum International Airport.

highlights.title: Flexible Payment Plan
highlights.description: Attractive 70:30 payment plan with 20% down payment, making ownership accessible for investors.

highlights.title: Golden Visa Eligible

description:
DAMAC Riverside Views is a luxurious off-plan apartment project featuring 1 and 2-bedroom residences located inside the Riverside master community at Dubai Investment Park (DIP). It’s part of a wellness-driven concept with artificial riverfronts, eco-friendly design, and nature-inspired architecture.

The development showcases two central amenity corridors Green Vein and Water Vein offering an unmatched lifestyle surrounded by hydroponic farms, floating sports zones, Zen spas, floating cinemas, and themed dining spaces like Malibu Cove, Portofino Ristorante, and The Island.

Key Information

  • Developer: DAMAC Properties
  • Community: DAMAC Riverside (Dubai Investment Park)
  • Project: DAMAC Riverside Views – Urban Waterfront Living
  • Property Types: 1 & 2 Bedroom Apartments
  • Starting Price: AED 888,000
  • Payment Plan: 70:30 (20% down, 50% during construction, 30% on handover)
  • Ownership: Freehold
  • Completion: Q2 2028 – ACD 31 March 2029
  • Government Fee: 4% DLD registration
  • Building Height: Mid-rise (approx. G+9)
  • Status: Off-Plan

Architectural Design & Features

The architecture draws inspiration from Mediterranean coastal towns with natural hues and sustainable design. Apartments feature smart layouts, wide balconies, and floor-to-ceiling glass walls overlooking river and park views. Green corridors, bio-filtered pools, and pedestrian-friendly walkways reinforce the project’s wellness-oriented vision.

Property Types

  • 1 Bedroom Apartments – Approx. 785 sq. ft.
  • 2 Bedroom Apartments – Approx. 1,324 sq. ft.

Project Timeline

  • Announcement: 2025 (Riverside Programme Launch)
  • Booking: Rolling tranche releases
  • Construction: Ongoing early works
  • Expected Completion: Q2 2028 / 31 March 2029 (ACD)

Exclusive Lifestyle Amenities

Green Vein Amenities

  • Hydroponic farms and culinary workshops
  • BBQ and live cooking zones
  • Co-working lounges and meditation rooms
  • Shaded parks and green community spaces

Water Vein Amenities

  • Bio-filtered and infinity swimming pools
  • Floating sports venue, floating opera & cinema
  • Aquatic fitness zones and children’s pools
  • Malibu Cove beach-style recreation zone
  • Portofino & Island restaurants

Everyday Living Facilities

  • Retail promenade with boutique outlets
  • Fully equipped gym and fitness facilities
  • Children’s play areas
  • Jogging and cycling tracks

Location & Connectivity

DAMAC Riverside Views is situated in Dubai Investment Park (DIP), close to Expo City Dubai and Al Maktoum International Airport (DWC), offering seamless access to major highways and future metro expansion.

  • E311 (Sheikh Mohammed Bin Zayed Road)
  • E611 (Emirates Road)
  • D57 (Jebel Ali–Al Hibab / Yalayis Street)

Travel Times (Approx.)

  • Expo City Dubai / DWC – 10–15 minutes
  • Dubai Marina / JBR – 25 minutes
  • Downtown Dubai / Business Bay – 30–35 minutes

Nearby Attractions

  • Global Village
  • Hamdan Sports Complex
  • Dubai Parks & Resorts (MOTIONGATE, LEGOLAND, Real Madrid World)

Nearby Hotels

  • The Courtyard by Marriott, Green Community
  • Rove Expo City
  • JA The Resort, Jebel Ali
  • Aloft Dubai South / Holiday Inn Dubai Al Maktoum Airport

Nearby Schools

  • The International School of Choueifat – DIP
  • South View School – Dubailand

Area Guide – Nearby Communities

  • Expo City Dubai
  • Dubai South
  • Green Community
  • Jebel Ali
  • Jumeirah Golf Estates
  • Dubai Sports City
  • Motor City
  • Business Bay
  • Downtown Dubai
  • Dubai Marina

Security

  • 24/7 community surveillance with CCTV
  • Controlled access and staffed lobbies
  • Illuminated pedestrian walkways

Why Invest in DAMAC Riverside Views

  • Prime DIP location near Expo City Dubai & DWC
  • Wellness-inspired masterplan with nature-focused design
  • Strong ROI potential from the Riverside development
  • Golden Visa eligibility (AED 2M+ investment)
  • Zero personal income tax in the UAE

Things to Do

  • Cycle and jog along Riverside’s pedestrian walkways
  • Attend wellness and culinary workshops
  • Watch movies or concerts at the floating opera & cinema

description:
Welcome to Bay Grove Residences – Phase 4, the final chapter of a prestigious residential collection by Nakheel. Situated in the vibrant Marina District of Dubai Islands, this master-planned coastal community offers panoramic waterfront views, direct beach access, and an elevated lifestyle experience just minutes from the city.

Prime Location on Dubai Islands

Positioned on Island B, one of the closest islands to the mainland, Bay Grove enjoys seamless access via Infinity Bridge and the newly developed causeways. The development is surrounded by 20 km of swimmable beaches and 50 km of waterfront communities, all while staying closely linked to Deira, Downtown Dubai, and Dubai International Airport.

Coastal Architecture and Panoramic Views

Bay Grove Residences Phase 4 introduces four new mid-rise buildings designed with a contemporary, coastal aesthetic. Warm sand-toned exteriors, clean white finishes, and curved balconies reflect the seaside environment. Each residence opens to sweeping views of the skyline, marina, and open sea through floor-to-ceiling windows.

From spacious 1-, 2-, and 3-bedroom apartments to exclusive 4-bedroom units and a signature penthouse, every home is crafted to offer light-filled interiors, private terraces, and refined finishes. Building 15 features only premium 4-bedroom units with private lobbies and dedicated drop-off access, offering unmatched exclusivity.

World-Class Amenities

  • Direct access to Crystal Beach and landscaped podium gardens
  • Elevated infinity lap pool and separate family pool
  • Fully equipped fitness centre and yoga studio
  • Indoor and outdoor kids’ play areas
  • Elegant clubhouse with cinema and event space
  • Outdoor BBQ zones, pet wash station, and jogging paths
  • Hotel-style drop-offs and 24/7 security

A Community Built for Comfort

This phase brings 257 residences together in a dynamic yet serene setting. Each building is linked by a shared podium and basement parking, while open green spaces and a vibrant promenade connect residents to nature and leisure. From skyline views to tranquil beachfront mornings, Bay Grove is built for those who want to balance city energy with the calm of the coast.

faqs.question: Where is Bay Grove Residences located?

faqs.question: Where is The Chedi Private Residences located?
faqs.answer: The Chedi Private Residences is located on Sheikh Zayed Road, strategically positioned 5 minutes from DIFC and 10 minutes from Dubai's pristine beaches. The location offers unparalleled connectivity to business districts, leisure destinations, and transportation hubs.

faqs.question: Who is behind the development?

faqs.question: What types of residences are available?

faqs.question: What is unique about the layouts?

faqs.question: When is handover expected?

faqs.question: Who is eligible to purchase a unit?

Jumeirah Asora Bay by Meraas is an upcoming ultra-luxurious residential development situated in the serene La Mer area of Jumeirah, Dubai. This exclusive project offers a limited collection of opulent residences, including 4 to 7-bedroom apartments, unique penthouses, and oceanfront mansions, all designed to provide an unparalleled beachfront living experience. With a handover date set for December 2026, Jumeirah Asora Bay promises to redefine coastal luxury in Dubai.​

Prime Location in La Mer, Jumeirah

Nestled within the prestigious La Mer community, Jumeirah Asora Bay enjoys a prime location along the tranquil Dubai Water Canal. This area is renowned for its high-end neighborhoods, lush parks, and proximity to Dubai’s iconic landmarks. Residents will benefit from easy access to Downtown Dubai, the Dubai International Financial Centre (DIFC), and Dubai International Airport, all within a 10-minute drive. The development's strategic position offers a perfect blend of coastal relaxation and vibrant city life.

Exquisite Residences with Panoramic Views

Jumeirah Asora Bay features an exclusive collection of 29 residences, comprising 4 to 6-bedroom apartments and an exceptional 7-bedroom penthouse. Each hillside residence is meticulously designed to ensure privacy while offering sweeping views of the pristine horizon. Upon arrival, residents are welcomed by a dedicated lobby with valet parking, unveiling breathtaking sea vistas that set the tone for the extraordinary living experience ahead.

Ocean Mansions: A Sanctuary of Serenity

For those seeking the pinnacle of luxury, the Ocean Mansions at Jumeirah Asora Bay provide a secluded oasis enveloped by lush private gardens and the glistening waters of the sea. Each villa serves as a personal retreat, featuring an infinity ocean pool that seamlessly blends into the horizon. Tranquil garden rooms offer spaces for reflection, while outdoor dining areas invite residents to enjoy meals under the stars, serenaded by the soothing rhythm of the waves. Integrated outdoor fitness areas further enhance the harmonious blend of wellness and nature.

Architectural Harmony with Nature

Jumeirah Asora Bay introduces a unique architectural perspective by integrating two majestic hills carved into the coast, each embracing the natural beauty of the sea. This innovative design creates an enclave of serenity that invites exploration, where architecture merges seamlessly with the landscape. Pathways wind through a valley, leading to stunning cliffside vistas and coves, allowing residents to connect deeply with their natural surroundings.

World-Class Amenities for an Elevated Lifestyle

Residents of Jumeirah Asora Bay will have access to an array of world-class amenities designed to promote relaxation and well-being:

  • Wellness Spa – A sanctuary offering a range of treatments to rejuvenate the mind and body.
  • Infinity Pools – Stunning pools that provide panoramic views of the ocean, creating a serene swimming experience.
  • Fitness Centers – State-of-the-art facilities equipped with cutting-edge equipment for comprehensive workouts.
  • Landscaped Gardens – Lush green spaces that offer a tranquil environment for leisurely walks and outdoor activities.
  • Members' Club – An exclusive venue for social gatherings and events, fostering a sense of community among residents.

These amenities ensure that every aspect of residents' lifestyles is catered to with the utmost attention to detail.

Proximity to Iconic Landmarks and Attractions

Residents of Jumeirah Asora Bay will enjoy proximity to several of Dubai's renowned attractions:

  • Dubai Mall and Burj Khalifa – World-class shopping and dining experiences just a short drive away.
  • Jumeirah Beach – Pristine sandy beaches offering a range of water sports and leisure activities.
  • Safa Park – Expansive green spaces ideal for picnics, jogging, and family outings.

This connectivity enhances the convenience and appeal of residing in Jumeirah Asora Bay, providing a perfect balance between tranquility and urban excitement.

Emaar Properties is a trusted name in the real estate industry, ensuring that properties maintain their value and prestige over time. The development also features premium retail outlets, dining venues, BBQ spots, and cafes, ensuring that residents have access to high-quality shopping and dining experiences without leaving the community. The presence of educational facilities and child-friendly recreational zones makes Ghaf Woods an excellent choice for families, offering a safe and enriching environment for children.

For investors looking to buy property in Dubai, Ghaf Woods presents an exceptional real estate opportunity with strong potential for capital appreciation and rental income. With the rising demand for sustainable communities, properties in Ghaf Woods are expected to gain significant value over time.

Whether for personal use or as a long-term investment, Ghaf Woods offers a secure and promising opportunity in Dubai’s real estate market.

Ghaf Woods by Majid Al Futtaim is more than just a luxury residential development - it is a groundbreaking concept that merges sustainability with high-end living. Whether you are seeking a dream home surrounded by nature or an investment opportunity with promising returns, Ghaf Woods offers an unparalleled living experience in the heart of Dubai.

With its forest-inspired architecture, world-class amenities, and strong focus on wellness, this unique residential community is set to redefine the future of sustainable real estate in Dubai.

  • Beachfront Dining: Enjoy delicious meals while soaking in the views of the beach.

Spa Services Offered at The Bristol Luxury Hotels

For those seeking relaxation, The Bristol Hotel Dubai offers a premium spa experience. Guests can indulge in a variety of treatments designed to rejuvenate the body and mind. The spa features:

Room Types and Pricing at The Bristol Hotel Dubai

Reviews of The Bristol Luxury Hotels in Dubai

Guests rave about the exceptional service and luxurious amenities at The Bristol Luxury Hotels. Many visitors also commend the quality of the dining options and spa services, making it a must-visit hotel for those looking for a five-star experience.

Whether you're seeking a family vacation, a romantic getaway, or business accommodations, The Bristol offers the perfect blend of luxury and convenience, making it one of the most sought-after destinations in Dubai. description:
Palm Jebel Ali, a visionary project by Nakheel Properties, redefines luxury waterfront living in Dubai. Building upon the legacy of Palm Jumeirah, Palm Jebel Ali introduces an expansive and exclusive community of villas, apartments, and waterfront homes, nestled along pristine beaches and surrounded by serene waters. Spanning an incredible area, this development is designed to offer unparalleled comfort, style, and tranquility for discerning buyers.

Located strategically, Palm Jebel Ali Dubai boasts excellent connectivity to the city’s most vibrant attractions and business hubs. With cutting-edge designs, sustainable living features, and exceptional amenities, this iconic project provides a harmonious blend of urban convenience and serene coastal living.


Strategic Location with World-Class Connectivity

Palm Jebel Ali is situated in Dubai Waterfront, offering breathtaking views of the Arabian Gulf. Its location provides seamless access to major highways, ensuring that residents can easily commute to key destinations such as Dubai Marina, Jebel Ali Port, and Dubai International Airport.

This prime location enhances the investment potential of Palm Jebel Ali properties, making it a top choice for professionals, families, and global investors. With plans for new metro connectivity and improved transportation links, the community is poised to become one of Dubai’s most accessible and sought-after addresses.


A Masterpiece of Design and Architecture

The design of Palm Jebel Ali is nothing short of extraordinary. This iconic project features uniquely designed villas, townhouses, and apartments that celebrate contemporary architecture while respecting the natural environment. The properties at Palm Jebel Ali come in a variety of configurations, including 3-bedroom, 4-bedroom, and 5-bedroom homes, catering to diverse lifestyle preferences.

Each home is meticulously crafted to maximize space, light, and comfort. With open-plan living areas, state-of-the-art kitchens, and expansive terraces overlooking the azure waters, Palm Jebel Ali villas and apartments offer a truly luxurious living experience.


Unparalleled Amenities for a Lavish Lifestyle

  • Private beaches and exclusive waterfront access.
  • Marinas and yacht clubs for sailing and leisure activities.
  • Lush landscaped gardens and cycling tracks.
  • Retail hubs featuring high-end shopping and dining options.
  • State-of-the-art fitness centers and wellness facilities.
  • A vibrant entertainment zone with family-friendly attractions.

The development is designed to promote a healthy, active lifestyle while offering the utmost luxury and convenience. From rejuvenating at the spa to enjoying water sports, residents are never far from their next adventure.


A Sustainable Future at Palm Jebel Ali

Sustainability is at the heart of Palm Jebel Ali by Nakheel Properties. The project incorporates eco-friendly technologies, energy-efficient systems, and ample green spaces to minimize environmental impact. These features not only contribute to a greener planet but also ensure a healthier and more sustainable lifestyle for residents.


Investment Opportunities with High ROI

Dubai’s real estate market is known for its exceptional investment opportunities, and Palm Jebel Ali properties are no exception. With its strategic location, world-class amenities, and iconic status, this development offers significant potential for capital appreciation and rental yields.

Villas and apartments for sale in Palm Jebel Ali are highly sought after by both local and international investors. The flexible payment plans and competitive pricing make it an ideal choice for those looking to diversify their portfolios or secure a luxurious family home.


A Community Like No Other

Palm Jebel Ali is not just a residential destination – it’s a community that fosters connection, recreation, and relaxation. The master-planned development includes schools, hospitals, and community centers, ensuring that every resident’s needs are met within walking distance.

The waterfront lifestyle is further enhanced by the vibrant social scene, with events, festivals, and cultural activities bringing residents together. Whether you’re enjoying a leisurely stroll along the promenade or savoring gourmet cuisine at waterfront restaurants, Palm Jebel Ali Dubai offers an unmatched sense of belonging.


Flexible Payment Plans for Effortless Ownership

Buying a home in Palm Jebel Ali has never been easier, thanks to Nakheel Properties’ flexible payment plans. These plans cater to both end-users and investors, allowing for stress-free financing and making luxury living more accessible.


Key Features of Palm Jebel Ali

  • Exclusive waterfront homes with private beach access.
  • Iconic architecture and sustainable design.
  • World-class amenities, including marinas, spas, and retail outlets.
  • Excellent connectivity to Dubai’s major landmarks.
  • High ROI and strong capital appreciation potential.
  • A thriving community with schools, healthcare facilities, and entertainment zones.

description:
Velora II by Emaar redefines the concept of modern townhouse living, offering residents an idyllic retreat within the thriving community of The Valley Phase 2. This contemporary development is designed for those who value elegance, functionality, and community living. Located in one of Dubai’s most promising areas, Velora II presents a unique opportunity for families, professionals, and investors seeking a high-quality lifestyle paired with robust investment potential.


Prime Location in The Valley

Positioned within The Valley Phase 2, Velora II benefits from a prime location that offers seamless connectivity to Dubai’s key landmarks. The development is conveniently accessible via Al Ain Road (E66), linking it to Downtown Dubai, Dubai Marina, and other major destinations in less than 30 minutes. This strategic location ensures residents can enjoy the serenity of suburban living while staying connected to the city’s vibrant energy.

The Valley is a burgeoning neighborhood with a wealth of community features, making it ideal for families and individuals looking to establish roots in a well-planned residential hub. Residents of Velora II enjoy proximity to major attractions like the Dubai Outlet Mall, Expo City Dubai, and top-rated educational institutions, ensuring all lifestyle needs are met.

Velora II townhouses offer a perfect blend of modern design and practical functionality, catering to a wide range of family sizes and preferences. Available in 3-bedroom and 4-bedroom configurations, these homes are thoughtfully crafted to maximize space, light, and comfort. With contemporary architectural elements, each townhouse features open-plan layouts that create seamless transitions between indoor and outdoor living spaces.

Key features include spacious living areas, high-quality finishes, and large windows that flood the interiors with natural light. The modern kitchens are equipped with premium appliances and sleek cabinetry, ensuring both style and functionality. Private gardens and terraces provide outdoor spaces for relaxation, entertainment, or personal retreat, making each home a haven of tranquility.

The master bedrooms are designed as luxurious sanctuaries, complete with en-suite bathrooms and walk-in closets, while secondary bedrooms offer ample storage and comfort. Velora II’s commitment to excellence ensures that every detail enhances the overall living experience.


A Community That Offers Something for Everyone

Velora II is not just about the homes; it’s about the lifestyle it offers. Residents have access to an impressive array of amenities that cater to all age groups and interests. The development features the Golden Beach, a beautifully designed leisure area with sandy shores and water features, providing a perfect spot for relaxation and family fun.

The Town Centre serves as the heart of the community, offering retail, dining, and entertainment options to enhance everyday life. Fitness enthusiasts will appreciate the state-of-the-art gymnasium, jogging tracks, and cycling paths that promote a healthy and active lifestyle. Families can enjoy the dedicated children’s play areas, splash parks, and green parks that foster a sense of community and provide safe spaces for children to play and explore.

Velora II also incorporates barbecue areas, picnic spots, and open spaces, making it easy for residents to connect with neighbors and create lasting memories. The focus on community-centric living ensures that Velora II is not just a place to live but a place to thrive.


Investment Opportunities at Velora II

Investing in Velora II by Emaar is a smart decision for several reasons. As part of The Valley Phase 2, the development is positioned in a rapidly growing area with strong potential for capital appreciation. The family-friendly appeal, coupled with modern amenities and a strategic location, ensures high rental demand, making it an attractive option for investors seeking strong returns.

Emaar’s reputation as a leading developer adds to the appeal, offering buyers the assurance of quality and timely delivery. The flexible payment plans provided by Emaar make it easier for investors and homeowners to secure their ideal property, further enhancing the investment potential of Velora II.


Sustainability and Green Living

Velora II embraces sustainability as a core principle, incorporating eco-friendly features and green landscaping throughout the community. The emphasis on energy efficiency and environmentally conscious design reflects a commitment to responsible living, ensuring that residents can enjoy a sustainable lifestyle without compromising on luxury or comfort.

The community’s pedestrian-friendly pathways and extensive green spaces encourage outdoor activities and promote well-being. The integration of sustainable practices makes Velora II a forward-thinking development that aligns with Dubai’s vision for a greener future.


Why Choose Velora II?

Velora II is the epitome of luxury, comfort, and convenience, offering residents a lifestyle that combines modern living with community values. With its high-quality townhouses, world-class amenities, and prime location, Velora II is a standout choice for families, professionals, and investors.

The development ensures residents enjoy access to top schools, healthcare facilities, and retail options, making it a complete package for those seeking a balanced and fulfilling life. The proximity to major transportation hubs and landmarks further enhances its appeal, making Velora II a top-tier investment in Dubai’s dynamic real estate market.

Families can enjoy lush parks, playgrounds, and community centres that cater to all age groups, making Damac Islands a family-friendly destination. For outdoor enthusiasts, Damac Islands provides ample recreational facilities, including jogging tracks, cycling paths, and water sports opportunities. The vibrant social atmosphere and comprehensive amenities create a harmonious blend of relaxation and activity.


Sustainability and Green Living

A key feature of Damac Islands is its commitment to sustainability. The development integrates eco-friendly practices, such as energy-efficient systems, water conservation measures, and expansive green spaces. This ensures that residents can enjoy a luxurious lifestyle while contributing to the preservation of the environment.

The focus on sustainability also enhances the overall quality of life within the community, making it a desirable choice for those seeking a healthier, greener lifestyle.


Investment Potential

Investing in Damac Islands Villas Dubai offers exceptional potential for high returns and capital appreciation. With its premium location, luxurious properties, and world-class amenities, Damac Islands is a magnet for investors seeking high-value opportunities in Dubai’s real estate market.

Flexible payment plans provided by Damac Properties make the development accessible to a wide range of buyers. Whether you’re purchasing a home for your family or as an investment, Damac Islands delivers value that goes beyond the purchase price.

With Dubai’s real estate market continuing to grow, properties in Damac Islands promise substantial appreciation, making it a wise long-term investment.

description:
Discover the epitome of modern luxury at The Acres Estates, an exclusive residential community in Dubai land by Meraas. This enclave of sophistication is designed to offer residents a life of grandeur, tranquillity, and convenience. With its premium 5-bedroom, 6-bedroom, and 7-bedroom villas, The Acres Estates combines elegant architectural designs with a serene environment to create a perfect retreat in the heart of Dubai.

The villas in The Acres Estates are crafted with attention to detail, ensuring a blend of opulence and practicality. Each residence is thoughtfully designed with expansive layouts, modern interiors, and floor-to-ceiling windows, allowing for an abundance of natural light and stunning views of the lush surroundings. These homes are not just about aesthetics - they are built to enhance comfort and functionality, making them ideal for families and individuals seeking a luxurious lifestyle.

The outdoor spaces are equally impressive, featuring private swimming pools, landscaped gardens, and ample open areas for relaxation or entertaining guests. From spacious living areas to state-of-the-art kitchens, every element of these homes is tailored to meet the needs of discerning residents. Whether you’re hosting an elegant dinner party or enjoying a quiet evening with your family, these villas provide the perfect setting.


Unparalleled Location

One of the standout features of The Acres Estates is its prime location in Dubai land, a rapidly growing area known for its family-friendly communities and exceptional connectivity. The development offers easy access to major highways like Sheikh Zayed Road, ensuring seamless travel to key destinations such as Downtown Dubai, Dubai Marina, and Al Maktoum International Airport.

Residents also enjoy proximity to some of Dubai’s most prestigious schools, world-class healthcare facilities, and a variety of leisure and entertainment options. With theme parks, shopping malls, and cultural attractions nearby, The Acres Estates offers a lifestyle that is both luxurious and convenient. For those seeking a peaceful retreat without compromising on connectivity, this community is a perfect choice.


Lifestyle and Amenities

Life at The Acres Estates is about more than just luxurious homes - it’s about a lifestyle enriched by world-class amenities and a vibrant community spirit. The development is designed to cater to every aspect of modern living, ensuring that residents have access to everything they need within the community.

  • Private swimming pools for relaxation and exercise.
  • State-of-the-art fitness centres equipped with the latest technology.
  • Green spaces and parks that promote wellness and outdoor activities.
  • Dedicated walking and cycling tracks, perfect for fitness enthusiasts.
  • Children’s play areas and community hubs that foster social interaction.

In addition to these features, the community prioritizes safety with 24/7 security and a gated environment, giving residents peace of mind. Whether you’re looking for a quiet evening stroll or a lively social gathering, The Acres Estates has something for everyone.


A Sustainable Future

The Acres Estates also emphasizes sustainability, incorporating eco-friendly practices into its design and development. The community features energy-efficient homes, sustainable landscaping, and green initiatives that promote a healthier environment. By prioritizing sustainability, this development not only enhances the quality of life for its residents but also contributes to Dubai’s vision of a greener future.


Investment Potential

Investing in The Acres Estates is not just about acquiring a home; it’s about securing a piece of Dubai’s lucrative real estate market. With the demand for luxury villas on the rise, properties in Dubai land are increasingly becoming a hotspot for investors. The combination of flexible payment plans, strategic location, and exceptional amenities makes The Acres Estates a prime choice for both end-users and investors.

The community’s high potential for capital appreciation and rental yields ensures a significant return on investment. As Dubai continues to expand and develop, owning a villa in this prestigious community is an opportunity to be part of the city’s thriving real estate landscape.


Community and Connectivity

Living in The Acres Estates means being part of a close-knit community that values family, wellness, and convenience. The development is designed to foster a sense of belonging, with community parks, shared spaces, and events that bring residents together. Its strategic location also ensures that residents are never far from the action, with easy access to Dubai’s bustling city centre, serene beaches, and cultural landmarks.

Whether you’re looking to build a life with your family, enjoy a luxurious retirement, or make a smart investment, The Acres Estates offers unparalleled opportunities. With its blend of exclusivity, luxury, and practicality, this community is set to become one of Dubai’s most coveted addresses.

faqs.answer: Prices start at AED 12 million for 5-bedroom villas and AED 18 million for 7-bedroom villas.

faqs.answer: Amenities include swimmable lagoons, parks, fitness centers, recreational areas, and walking trails.

faqs.answer: Flexible payment plans with installments over 5 years are available.

faqs.question: Are there schools and recreational parks near The Acres Estates?
faqs.answer: Yes, the community is surrounded by schools, nurseries, and parks, ensuring a family-friendly environment.

faqs.question: When is the expected handover date for villas in The Acres Estates?
faqs.answer: The project is scheduled for handover in Q4 2026.

faqs.question: What makes The Acres Estates a good investment opportunity?
faqs.answer: The combination of luxury, sustainability, and proximity to key landmarks offers high ROI potential.

faqs.question: How sustainable is the living environment in The Acres Estates?
faqs.answer: The development includes eco-friendly homes, green spaces, and energy-efficient systems.

faqs.question: Are the villas in The Acres Estates eco-friendly?
faqs.answer: Yes, the villas are designed with sustainability in mind, incorporating green building practices.

faqs.question: How does The Acres Estates compare to other luxury developments in Dubai?
faqs.answer: Its nature-inspired living, swimmable lagoons, and exclusive design set it apart from other developments.

description:
Nestled within the dynamic and master-planned community of Emaar South, Greenridge townhouses epitomize luxury and convenience in Dubai's real estate landscape. Designed to cater to modern families and discerning investors, Greenridge Emaar South offers an exquisite collection of 3- and 4-bedroom townhouses that blend contemporary design, functional layouts, and unmatched community amenities. Whether you're looking for a serene place to call home or a lucrative investment opportunity, Greenridge at Emaar South promises a lifestyle like no other.


Contemporary Townhouse Living

The architectural brilliance of Greenridge townhouses is evident in their meticulous design and thoughtful layouts. These homes boast spacious living areas, modern kitchens, and elegantly crafted bedrooms that maximize natural light and comfort. The interiors are designed to reflect a sense of openness, ensuring every square foot serves a purpose. Each townhouse features a private garden, offering a tranquil space for families to unwind, host gatherings, or simply enjoy the outdoors.

The focus on creating a seamless indoor-outdoor living experience makes Greenridge stand out as a hallmark of luxury townhouses in Dubai. With open-plan designs, high-quality finishes, and attention to detail, Greenridge homes are as functional as they are stylish.


A Community That Enriches Lives

Greenridge at Emaar South is more than just a collection of townhouses; it’s a vibrant, family-oriented community. Residents enjoy a wealth of amenities, designed to foster a sense of belonging and enhance quality of life:

  • Parks and Green Spaces: Perfect for leisurely strolls, picnics, or outdoor workouts.
  • Swimming Pools and Fitness Facilities: Encourage a healthy and active lifestyle.
  • Children’s Play Areas: Provide safe and fun spaces for young residents.

The carefully planned layout of Greenridge ensures that every resident has easy access to these amenities, creating a harmonious blend of privacy and community living. Whether you're looking to relax, socialize, or stay active, Emaar South community features cater to all aspects of modern living.


Prime Location with Seamless Connectivity

Strategically located near Al Maktoum International Airport and the Expo 2020 site, Greenridge Emaar South offers unparalleled connectivity to key destinations in Dubai. Residents enjoy easy access to major highways, including Sheikh Mohammed Bin Zayed Road and Emirates Road, making commutes to Downtown Dubai, Dubai Marina, and other bustling areas a breeze.

Additionally, the community is close to several international schools, healthcare facilities, and shopping centers, ensuring that families have all essential services within reach. For golf enthusiasts, Emaar South’s championship golf course is a significant highlight, providing an exclusive space to unwind and enjoy the sport.


The Emaar South Advantage

As part of the larger Emaar South master plan, Greenridge benefits from a wealth of infrastructure and lifestyle enhancements. This visionary development by Emaar is designed to create a self-contained community that caters to the needs of residents and investors alike. From lush green landscapes to modern urban conveniences, Emaar South is redefining suburban living in Dubai.

The integration of Greenridge into this thriving community ensures that residents are part of an ecosystem that promotes well-being, sustainability, and social interaction. With its proximity to the Expo City Dubai and Dubai World Central, Greenridge townhouses are poised for significant appreciation in value, making them a smart choice for those seeking both a home and an investment.


Why Greenridge Is a Sound Investment

Greenridge at Emaar South offers an unbeatable combination of affordability, luxury, and potential for high returns on investment. The flexible payment plans make it easier for first-time buyers and seasoned investors to own a piece of this thriving community. The increasing demand for family-oriented housing in Dubai, coupled with Greenridge’s strategic location and world-class amenities, ensures that this development remains a coveted address.

Investors can also benefit from the high rental yields that Emaar South properties are known to deliver. The blend of luxury living and affordability appeals to a wide range of tenants, ensuring consistent demand and robust returns.


Sustainable Living at Its Best

Sustainability is at the heart of Greenridge townhouses, with eco-friendly designs and green spaces integrated throughout the community. Emaar’s commitment to sustainable development ensures that Greenridge is not only a great place to live but also a contribution to Dubai’s greener future.

Residents can enjoy energy-efficient homes, landscaped surroundings, and thoughtfully designed spaces that encourage a connection with nature. From walking trails to communal gardens, every element of Greenridge is designed to promote a balanced and eco-conscious lifestyle.


Highlights of Greenridge at Emaar South

  • Luxury Townhouses: Spacious 3- and 4-bedroom homes with modern architecture and private gardens.
  • Family-Friendly Community: Parks, play areas, and a host of amenities for families.
  • Prime Location: Proximity to Al Maktoum International Airport, major highways, and key Dubai landmarks.
  • Investment Potential: High rental yields and robust ROI opportunities.
  • Sustainability: Eco-friendly designs and a focus on green living.

With its combination of style, comfort, and investment appeal, Greenridge at Emaar South offers a lifestyle that’s second to none. Whether you’re seeking a serene family home or a property with strong growth potential, Greenridge is the perfect choice.

description:
Nestled in the heart of Dubai Maritime City, Saria by Beyond offers an exquisite blend of contemporary design and luxurious waterfront living. This remarkable development stands as a beacon for those seeking a serene yet vibrant lifestyle, perfectly encapsulating the essence of modern urban living. With its strategic location, top-tier amenities, and stunning architectural designs, Saria is an ideal choice for families, professionals, and investors alike.


Prime Location in Dubai Maritime City

Saria by Beyond enjoys a prime location in Dubai Maritime City, a dynamic area known for its seamless connectivity and breathtaking marina views. Positioned strategically close to Dubai’s central business districts, iconic landmarks, and major transport routes, Saria offers residents the convenience of urban living paired with the tranquillity of waterfront surroundings.

The development’s proximity to Dubai Marina, Downtown Dubai, and the bustling Sheikh Zayed Road ensures that residents can easily access the city’s premier shopping, dining, and entertainment destinations. Furthermore, the nearby Etihad Rail station enhances connectivity, making Saria a highly desirable address for both residents and investors.


Architectural Elegance and Modern Homes

The residences at Saria are a testament to architectural brilliance and meticulous attention to detail. Featuring 1-bedroom, 2-bedroom, 3-bedroom, and 4-bedroom luxury apartments, the homes are thoughtfully designed to cater to diverse lifestyle needs. Each unit boasts expansive layouts, floor-to-ceiling windows, and modern finishes that maximize natural light and panoramic marina views.

The interiors of the apartments are crafted with precision, blending sleek modern aesthetics with practical functionality. High-quality materials and contemporary design elements come together to create homes that exude sophistication and comfort. Spacious balconies offer a private outdoor sanctuary, allowing residents to soak in the stunning waterfront scenery.


Unmatched Amenities for a Luxurious Lifestyle

Saria by Beyond redefines luxury living with a host of world-class amenities designed to enrich the lives of its residents. The development includes state-of-the-art fitness centres, infinity pools overlooking the marina, and dedicated children’s play areas, ensuring a balanced and vibrant lifestyle for families and individuals.

For those seeking relaxation, the beautifully landscaped gardens and serene walking paths provide a peaceful retreat from the hustle and bustle of city life. Additionally, the development offers a variety of dining and retail options, allowing residents to enjoy world-class services just steps from their door.

The inclusion of advanced security systems and 24/7 concierge services ensures peace of mind for residents, making Saria a secure and comfortable place to call home.


Investment Potential in Dubai Real Estate

Saria by Beyond is not just a residential development; it’s a smart investment opportunity. Dubai Maritime City is an emerging hotspot, attracting investors with its prime location and high potential for capital appreciation. The competitive pricing of units at Saria makes it an attractive option for those looking to maximize returns in Dubai’s thriving real estate market.

Flexible payment plans further enhance the appeal, making it easier for investors and homeowners to secure their dream property. The consistent demand for premium waterfront residences ensures that investments in Saria will yield substantial rental yields and long-term value growth.


Sustainability and Smart Living

Aligned with Dubai’s commitment to sustainability, Saria by Beyond integrates eco-friendly practices into its design and construction. The development features energy-efficient systems and sustainable landscaping, reducing its environmental footprint while enhancing the quality of life for residents.

Smart home technology is also a hallmark of Saria, offering residents enhanced control over their living environment. From climate control to advanced security features, the integration of technology ensures a seamless and modern living experience.


A Vibrant Waterfront Community

Living in Saria by Beyond means becoming part of a vibrant waterfront community that celebrates the best of urban and natural living. The development’s prime location within Dubai Maritime City places residents at the heart of a thriving cultural and recreational hub, where maritime heritage meets modern luxury.

The marina serves as a focal point, offering a range of activities, from yacht cruises to waterfront dining experiences. The development’s close-knit community fosters a sense of belonging, making Saria a perfect choice for those seeking a fulfilling and dynamic lifestyle.

description:
The Franck Muller Vanguard by London Gate is a signature project that redefines luxury living in the vibrant heart of Dubai Marina. Inspired by the timeless elegance and precision of the Franck Muller brand, this residential tower offers an unparalleled experience for those who seek sophistication, modernity, and convenience. From fully furnished apartments to premium amenities, Franck Muller Vanguard is an exceptional addition to Dubai’s skyline.


Prime Location in Dubai Marina

Situated in one of the city’s most prestigious neighbourhoods, Franck Muller Vanguard at Dubai Marina offers residents proximity to Dubai’s most iconic destinations. The tower enjoys seamless connectivity to Sheikh Zayed Road, ensuring easy access to Downtown Dubai, Palm Jumeirah, and other key hubs. Residents can also take advantage of the Dubai Metro and Dubai Tram, which are just a short distance away.

The Dubai Marina Walk provides a vibrant lifestyle with retail outlets, fine dining restaurants, and entertainment options, all within walking distance. The marina’s waterfront adds an element of serenity, while the buzzing city life remains just around the corner.


Exquisite Apartments Tailored to Perfection

Franck Muller Vanguard offers a variety of unit types, including fully furnished studio, 1-bedroom, 2-bedroom, and 3-bedroom apartments, all designed to meet the highest standards of luxury. The interiors are meticulously crafted, reflecting the precision and innovation associated with the Franck Muller brand. Premium materials, elegant finishes, and state-of-the-art appliances ensure a lifestyle of unparalleled comfort and style.

Each apartment is thoughtfully designed to optimize space and natural light, with large windows offering breathtaking views of the Dubai Marina, Palm Jumeirah, and the Arabian Gulf. From modern kitchens to luxurious bathrooms, every detail speaks of sophistication and quality.


Unrivalled Amenities for a Modern Lifestyle

Residents of Franck Muller Vanguard enjoy access to a wide range of amenities that cater to leisure, wellness, and social needs. Key features include:

  • Infinity Pool: Relax with panoramic views of the Dubai skyline and the marina.
  • State-of-the-Art Gym: Equipped with the latest fitness technology to keep you active and healthy.
  • 24/7 Concierge and Security Services: Ensuring a safe and hassle-free living experience.
  • Retail and Dining Options: Located within the tower, offering ultimate convenience.
  • Wellness Facilities: Including a spa and yoga studio for complete relaxation.

The property also boasts ample parking, smart home integration, and sustainable features that align with Dubai’s vision for eco-friendly living.


Flexible Payment Plans and Investment Opportunities

The 30/70 payment plan offered by Franck Muller Vanguard provides flexibility, making it an attractive investment opportunity. With apartments starting at AED 1.2M, the development is competitively priced for the luxury real estate market. The high rental yield potential in Dubai Marina further enhances its appeal for investors.

The project’s expected handover in 2027 ensures ample time for buyers to plan their finances while reaping the benefits of a world-class residence in a prime location.


Why Invest in Franck Muller Vanguard?

Investing in Franck Muller Vanguard is about more than owning a property; it’s about being part of an exclusive lifestyle. With its iconic branding, prime location, and luxury features, the tower is poised to become one of Dubai Marina’s most desirable addresses. Whether you’re looking for a dream home or a high-return investment, Franck Muller Vanguard offers unmatched value.


A Statement of Prestige

Living at Franck Muller Vanguard means embracing a lifestyle that blends luxury, innovation, and timeless elegance. From the iconic name it carries to the meticulously designed residences, this project is a true testament to Dubai’s position as a global leader in luxury real estate. It’s more than a home - it’s a statement of prestige.

faqs.answer: The combination of its prime location in Dubai Marina, branded luxury interiors, and flexible payment plans make it an ideal choice for investors seeking high ROI.

faqs.answer: The development is located in the heart of Dubai Marina, within walking distance of Marina Mall, JBR Beach, and the Dubai Marina Yacht Club.

faqs.answer: The development offers a luxurious urban lifestyle with easy access to the marina, nightlife, world-class shopping, and cultural landmarks.

description:
South Garden, located in the vibrant Wasl Gate community, redefines urban living in Dubai. Offering a mix of contemporary residences, this development provides a perfect balance between luxury and affordability. With its prime location in Jebel Ali South, South Garden at Wasl Gate ensures that residents enjoy unmatched connectivity, access to world-class amenities, and an enriching lifestyle.

Whether you’re a young professional, a growing family, or an investor, South Garden Dubai offers the ideal blend of convenience, comfort, and community. With its studio apartments, 1-bedroom, 2-bedroom, and 3-bedroom apartments, there’s something for everyone in this sought-after development.


Unparalleled Urban Connectivity

South Garden benefits from a strategic location at the heart of Wasl Gate, a bustling residential, commercial, and retail hub. Residents enjoy:

  • Proximity to Sheikh Zayed Road: Seamless connectivity to key areas like Dubai Marina, Downtown Dubai, and Expo City Dubai.
  • Jebel Ali Metro Station: Direct access to Dubai’s efficient public transport system, reducing commute times and enhancing convenience.
  • Nearby Key Destinations: Close proximity to Jebel Ali Free Zone, Al Maktoum International Airport, and the new Dubai South District, making it ideal for professionals working in these areas.

The location also offers excellent access to nearby schools, hospitals, and retail outlets, ensuring residents have everything they need close at hand.


Modern Homes with Thoughtful Designs

Bay Grove Residences, a signature project by Nakheel, redefines the essence of luxury beachfront living at the iconic Dubai Islands. Designed for those seeking an exceptional waterfront lifestyle, these residences offer a blend of contemporary design, state-of-the-art amenities, and unparalleled location advantages. The Ultimate Residential Experience

Bay Grove Residences is a carefully curated development offering an array of spacious apartments and penthouses tailored to meet the demands of modern living. Each unit, ranging from 1-bedroom apartments to opulent 4-bedroom penthouses, exudes elegance and comfort. Key highlights of the residences include:

  • Modern Interiors: Crafted with meticulous attention to detail, each home features high-end finishes and contemporary design aesthetics.
  • Panoramic Views: Enjoy uninterrupted vistas of the Arabian Gulf, the Dubai skyline, or beautifully landscaped gardens.
  • Smart Home Integration: Equipped with cutting-edge technology, residents can control lighting, security, and temperature at the touch of a button.
  • Expansive Layouts: Open-plan designs maximize space, light, and functionality, creating a welcoming environment.

For those seeking ultimate exclusivity, the 4-bedroom penthouses provide unmatched luxury with private pools, expansive terraces, and designer interiors.


Amenities That Define Luxury

Living at Bay Grove Residences means enjoying access to an impressive array of amenities designed to elevate your lifestyle. These include:

  • Infinity Pools: Overlooking the tranquil waters of the Gulf, perfect for relaxation and recreation.
