  • Pet-Friendly Spaces: Dedicated areas for pet owners ensure every family member feels at home.

This wealth of amenities makes Bay Grove Residences more than just a home - it's a vibrant community designed for well-rounded living.


Strategic Location at Dubai Islands

Bay Grove Residences enjoys a prime location within Dubai Islands, offering unmatched connectivity and scenic beauty. Its strategic position provides:

  • Proximity to Major Hubs: Minutes away from Downtown Dubai, Dubai Marina, and the bustling Expo City.
  • Convenience of Travel: Located near Dubai International Airport and accessible via major highways, including Sheikh Zayed Road.
  • Etihad Rail Connectivity: Future integration with the Etihad Rail network will enhance connectivity to other emirates and key destinations.

Dubai Islands is a visionary development transforming Dubai’s real estate landscape, offering a perfect balance between urban convenience and tranquil waterfront living.


Investment Opportunities in Bay Grove Residences

For investors, Bay Grove Residences represents a lucrative opportunity with significant potential for capital appreciation. The demand for premium waterfront properties in Dubai continues to grow, making this development an attractive option. Key reasons to invest include:

  • High Rental Yields: Waterfront properties in Dubai are among the most sought after, ensuring consistent rental income.
  • Flexible Payment Plans: Attractive and affordable options make it easier for buyers to own a piece of luxury.
  • Capital Growth: With Dubai Islands rapidly becoming a real estate hotspot, property values are poised to increase significantly.
  • Low Service Charges: Competitive rates ensure that maintaining your property is cost-effective, further enhancing ROI.

Moreover, owning property in Dubai Islands opens up access to Golden Visa eligibility, a unique incentive for international buyers.


Community Highlights

Bay Grove Residences is more than just an address; it’s a lifestyle. Residents will enjoy access to:

  • 27 km of Cycling Tracks: Ideal for fitness enthusiasts and eco-conscious individuals.
  • Crystal Lagoons: The community boasts pristine lagoons perfect for leisure activities.
  • Exclusive Events: Regularly hosted events and community gatherings create a vibrant social life.
  • Proximity to Nature: Expansive green spaces and waterfront promenades create a serene environment, fostering a sense of connection with nature.

In addition, the development's proximity to world-class education, healthcare, and retail options makes it an ideal location for families.


Tailored Payment Plans

Nakheel understands the importance of financial flexibility for buyers. Bay Grove Residences offers bespoke payment plans, enabling potential homeowners to secure their dream property with ease. The structured plans cater to varying budgets and needs, ensuring that luxury remains accessible.


Sustainability at the Core

Bay Grove Residences embraces sustainable living. From energy-efficient designs to green community features, this development aligns with Dubai's vision for a greener, more sustainable future. Residents can enjoy modern comforts without compromising environmental responsibility.

title: Violet 3
fullTitle: Violet Phase 3 Townhouses at Damac Hills 2
description:
Violet 3 at DAMAC Hills 2 is an exceptional residential community that redefines contemporary living in Dubai. Nestled in the thriving locale of DAMAC Hills 2, this project offers a harmonious blend of nature-inspired living and modern amenities. Perfectly suited for families and individuals seeking a peaceful yet connected lifestyle, Violet 3 promises a unique living experience within a lush, eco-friendly environment.

The 4-bedroom townhouses in Violet 3 DAMAC Hills 2 are meticulously designed to provide both comfort and elegance. Each townhouse features modern architecture, spacious layouts, and high-end finishes, making them a perfect choice for discerning homeowners. With private gardens and access to a host of world-class amenities, residents can enjoy a holistic lifestyle surrounded by greenery and tranquillity.


Prime Location for Connectivity and Convenience

Strategically located within DAMAC Hills 2, Violet 3 offers residents excellent connectivity to major destinations across Dubai. The community is just a short drive from Downtown Dubai and Dubai Marina, ensuring easy access to business hubs, entertainment zones, and shopping destinations. Proximity to major highways like Sheikh Zayed Road and Al Qudra Road ensures seamless travel within the city and beyond.

Additionally, DAMAC Hills 2 is renowned for its thoughtfully designed infrastructure, which includes wide roads, cycling tracks, and pedestrian-friendly pathways. Residents of Violet 3 townhouses benefit from living in a well-planned community that prioritizes convenience and accessibility.


Exceptional Design and Features

The modern architecture of Violet 3 townhouses sets them apart from other developments in Dubai. These homes are designed with attention to detail, offering open-plan layouts, large windows that maximize natural light, and premium materials that exude luxury. Each townhouse is equipped with a private garden, allowing residents to enjoy outdoor living in the comfort of their own home.

The interiors of these townhouses are equally impressive, featuring contemporary designs, high-quality finishes, and smart home technology to enhance daily living. Whether you're entertaining guests or spending quality time with family, Violet 3 townhouses provide a perfect setting for every occasion.

Unmatched Amenities for a Holistic Lifestyle

Living in Violet 3 DAMAC Hills 2 means access to an array of world-class amenities designed to cater to every need. From state-of-the-art fitness centres and swimming pools to sports facilities and parks, the community offers something for everyone. The lazy river and water town facilities are standout features, providing residents with unique recreational opportunities.

Families will appreciate the community's focus on creating a child-friendly environment, with dedicated play areas, schools, and nurseries within easy reach. For those who enjoy an active lifestyle, Violet 3 offers jogging tracks, outdoor gyms, and sports courts, ensuring residents can stay fit and healthy.


A Haven for Nature Lovers

Violet 3 townhouses in DAMAC Hills 2 are surrounded by lush greenery, landscaped parks, and open spaces, making them an ideal choice for nature enthusiasts. The community's commitment to sustainability is evident in its eco-friendly initiatives and emphasis on green living. With ample outdoor spaces and natural beauty, residents can unwind and reconnect with nature while enjoying the benefits of modern living.


Investment Potential

Investing in Violet 3 DAMAC Hills 2 offers a unique opportunity to own property in one of Dubai’s most sought-after communities. The competitive pricing of these 4-bedroom townhouses combined with the development's location and amenities makes it an attractive option for both investors and homeowners.

As DAMAC Hills 2 continues to grow and evolve, property values are expected to appreciate, offering a promising return on investment. The community's reputation as a family-friendly and eco-conscious destination adds to its appeal, ensuring sustained demand for properties in the area.


Flexible Payment Plans

Purchasing a townhouse in Violet 3 is made easier with flexible payment plans that cater to a variety of budgets. DAMAC Properties offers competitive terms, allowing buyers to secure their dream home without financial strain. This flexibility ensures that Violet 3 townhouses are accessible to a wide range of buyers, from first-time homeowners to seasoned investors.


A Vibrant Community for Families

Violet 3 at DAMAC Hills 2 is designed with families in mind, offering a safe and inclusive environment where residents can thrive. The combination of spacious homes, family-friendly amenities, and proximity to schools and healthcare facilities makes it an ideal place to raise a family.

Residents also benefit from a vibrant community atmosphere, with events and activities that foster a sense of belonging. Whether it’s a weekend barbecue in your private garden or a leisurely stroll through the community parks, Violet 3 provides a lifestyle that is both fulfilling and enriching.

title: Velora
fullTitle: Velora Townhouses by Emaar at The Valley Dubai
description:
Velora II by Emaar redefines the concept of modern townhouse living, offering residents an idyllic retreat within the thriving community of The Valley Phase 2. This contemporary development is designed for those who value elegance, functionality, and community living. Located in one of Dubai’s most promising areas, Velora II presents a unique opportunity for families, professionals, and investors seeking a high-quality lifestyle paired with robust investment potential.


Prime Location in The Valley

Positioned within The Valley Phase 2, Velora II benefits from a prime location that offers seamless connectivity to Dubai’s key landmarks. The development is conveniently accessible via Al Ain Road (E66), linking it to Downtown Dubai, Dubai Marina, and other major destinations in less than 30 minutes. This strategic location ensures residents can enjoy the serenity of suburban living while staying connected to the city’s vibrant energy.

The Valley is a burgeoning neighbourhood with a wealth of community features, making it ideal for families and individuals looking to establish roots in a well-planned residential hub. Residents of Velora II enjoy proximity to major attractions like the Dubai Outlet Mall, Expo City Dubai, and top-rated educational institutions, ensuring all lifestyle needs are met.


Elegant Townhouses Designed for Modern Living

Velora II townhouses offer a perfect blend of modern design and practical functionality, catering to a wide range of family sizes and preferences. Available in 3-bedroom and 4-bedroom configurations, these homes are thoughtfully crafted to maximize space, light, and comfort. With contemporary architectural elements, each townhouse features open-plan layouts that create seamless transitions between indoor and outdoor living spaces.

Key features include spacious living areas, high-quality finishes, and large windows that flood the interiors with natural light. The modern kitchens are equipped with premium appliances and sleek cabinetry, ensuring both style and functionality. Private gardens and terraces provide outdoor spaces for relaxation, entertainment, or personal retreat, making each home a haven of tranquillity.

The master bedrooms are designed as luxurious sanctuaries, complete with en-suite bathrooms and walk-in closets, while secondary bedrooms offer ample storage and comfort. Velora II’s commitment to excellence ensures that every detail enhances the overall living experience.


A Community That Offers Something for Everyone

Velora II is not just about the homes; it’s about the lifestyle it offers. Residents have access to an impressive array of amenities that cater to all age groups and interests. The development features the Golden Beach, a beautifully designed leisure area with sandy shores and water features, providing a perfect spot for relaxation and family fun.

The Town Centre serves as the heart of the community, offering retail, dining, and entertainment options to enhance everyday life. Fitness enthusiasts will appreciate the state-of-the-art gymnasium, jogging tracks, and cycling paths that promote a healthy and active lifestyle. Families can enjoy the dedicated children’s play areas, splash parks, and green parks that foster a sense of community and provide safe spaces for children to play and explore.

Velora II also incorporates barbecue areas, picnic spots, and open spaces, making it easy for residents to connect with neighbours and create lasting memories. The focus on community-centric living ensures that Velora II is not just a place to live but a place to thrive.


Investment Opportunities at Velora II

Investing in Velora II by Emaar is a smart decision for several reasons. As part of The Valley Phase 2, the development is positioned in a rapidly growing area with strong potential for capital appreciation. The family-friendly appeal, coupled with modern amenities and a strategic location, ensures high rental demand, making it an attractive option for investors seeking strong returns.

Emaar’s reputation as a leading developer adds to the appeal, offering buyers the assurance of quality and timely delivery. The flexible payment plans provided by Emaar make it easier for investors and homeowners to secure their ideal property, further enhancing the investment potential of Velora II.


Sustainability and Green Living

Velora II embraces sustainability as a core principle, incorporating eco-friendly features and green landscaping throughout the community. The emphasis on energy efficiency and environmentally conscious design reflects a commitment to responsible living, ensuring that residents can enjoy a sustainable lifestyle without compromising on luxury or comfort.

The community’s pedestrian-friendly pathways and extensive green spaces encourage outdoor activities and promote well-being. The integration of sustainable practices makes Velora II a forward-thinking development that aligns with Dubai’s vision for a greener future.


Why Choose Velora II?

Velora II is the epitome of luxury, comfort, and convenience, offering residents a lifestyle that combines modern living with community values. With its high-quality townhouses, world-class amenities, and prime location, Velora II is a standout choice for families, professionals, and investors.

The development ensures residents enjoy access to top schools, healthcare facilities, and retail options, making it a complete package for those seeking a balanced and fulfilling life. The proximity to major transportation hubs and landmarks further enhances its appeal, making Velora II a top-tier investment in Dubai’s dynamic real estate market.

title: Arabian Hills Estate
fullTitle: Arabian Hills Estate by Deca Properties in Dubai

highlights.title: Largest Gated Community
highlights.description: The largest gated community in the UAE with world-class amenities and facilities.

highlights.title: Affordable Luxury
highlights.description: Starting at just AED 130 per sq. ft., build 5-6 bedroom villas for AED 4-5 million.

highlights.title: Prime Location
highlights.description: Strategic location on Dubai-Al-Ain Road with direct access to Dubai, Abu Dhabi, and Al Ain.

highlights.title: World-Class Amenities
highlights.description: Largest swimmable lagoon, equestrian facilities, cycling tracks, retail, and more.

highlights.title: Design Freedom
highlights.description: Complete creative freedom to design your villa with no architectural restrictions.

highlights.title: Golden Visa Eligible
highlights.description: Property purchase qualifies for UAE Golden Visa with long-term residency benefits.

description:
Arabian Hills Estate stands as a beacon of modern luxury and strategic investment opportunities in the UAE real estate market. Nestled along the Dubai-Al-Ain Road, this prestigious development offers an ideal blend of affordability, flexibility, and premium amenities, catering to homeowners and investors alike. With its unparalleled connectivity, exceptional lifestyle offerings, and remarkable potential for capital appreciation, Arabian Hills Estate emerges as a dream destination to call home or secure a lucrative property investment.


Unmatched Location and Connectivity

Strategically situated on the Dubai-Al-Ain Road, Arabian Hills Estate enjoys direct access to Dubai, Abu Dhabi, and Al Ain. The location ensures seamless connectivity with zero traffic signals and proximity to major urban centres. Furthermore, the upcoming Etihad Railway will feature a dedicated station within the development, providing swift access to key areas across the UAE and adding immense value to property investments here.

Surrounded by landmark developments and burgeoning infrastructure, Arabian Hills Estate is poised for exponential growth. The area is witnessing rapid urbanization, driven by leading developers, ensuring that property values continue to rise, making it a highly desirable destination for future-focused investments.


Arabian Hills 2: The Next Evolution in Luxurious Living

Building on the legacy of the original development, Arabian Hills 2 extends the grandeur and exclusivity of this premium community. Located adjacent to the flagship estate, Arabian Hills 2 introduces new features and larger plot sizes, catering to those who seek even greater privacy and flexibility in designing their homes. Residents of Arabian Hills 2 will also benefit from the same exceptional connectivity and lifestyle amenities while enjoying additional enhancements tailored to the evolving needs of modern homeowners.


Incredible Affordability and Flexibility

Arabian Hills Estate offers a rare opportunity to own land at an unbeatable price. Starting at just AED 130 per sq. ft., buyers can secure spacious plots to build 5-6-bedroom villas for approximately AED 4-5 million, a fraction of the cost of similar properties in other prime locations. This cost-effectiveness ensures homeowners can enjoy unparalleled luxury without exceeding their budget.

The financial benefits don’t end there. With a two-year post-handover payment plan and up to seven years to complete construction (including a one-year grace period), buyers can manage their finances conveniently while planning their dream home. These flexible terms make Arabian Hills Estate a standout option in the Dubai property market.


World-Class Amenities for a Complete Lifestyle

Living in Arabian Hills Estate is about more than just owning property - it’s about embracing a lifestyle of luxury and convenience. As the largest gated community in the UAE, Arabian Hills Estate boasts a plethora of amenities:

  • Largest Swimmable Lagoon: Perfect for relaxation and recreation.
  • Equestrian and Polo Facilities: Catering to horse enthusiasts and outdoor adventurers.
  • Retail Shops and Dining Options: Ensuring daily needs and indulgences are met within the community.
  • Educational and Healthcare Facilities: Including international schools and state-of-the-art hospitals.
  • Extensive Cycling Tracks: A 27-kilometer stretch promoting fitness and sustainability.
  • Green Spaces and Parks: Providing a serene environment for families and individuals.
  • Community Malls and Hotels: Adding convenience and luxury to everyday living.

These thoughtfully curated amenities make Arabian Hills Estate a "city within a city," offering everything residents need within a secure, gated environment.


High Capital Appreciation and Investment Potential

With minimal competition in the area, Arabian Hills Estate presents a golden opportunity for investors. The area’s strategic location, ongoing infrastructure developments, and rising demand for residential plots create a promising environment for property appreciation. Whether you're looking to build a home or diversify your real estate portfolio, Arabian Hills Estate is an investment that promises long-term value.

Arabian Hills Estate vs. Arabian Hills 2: A Comparative Highlight

While Arabian Hills Estate is renowned for its affordability and amenities, Arabian Hills 2 elevates the offering with larger plot sizes, enhanced privacy, and additional premium features. Together, these developments cater to a broad spectrum of buyers, from young families to seasoned investors, ensuring there’s something for everyone.


Design Freedom: Build Your Dream Home

Unlike many other developments, Arabian Hills Estate allows buyers complete creative freedom to design their homes. Whether you prefer a sleek, modern villa or a traditional family estate, the possibilities are endless. This flexibility ensures that every home reflects its owner’s unique vision and lifestyle.


Low Service Charges and Golden Visa Eligibility

With service charges set at just AED 1 per sq. ft. (applied only after construction begins), Arabian Hills Estate ensures minimal ongoing costs. Additionally, purchasing property here qualifies buyers for the UAE’s Golden Visa, providing long-term residency benefits - a valuable incentive for international buyers.


Why Choose Arabian Hills Estate and Arabian Hills 2?

  • Prime Location: Unparalleled access to major cities via Dubai-Al-Ain Road and Etihad Railway.
  • Flexible Payment Plans: Up to two years post-handover and seven years for construction.
  • World-Class Amenities: From swimmable lagoons to retail hubs and cycling tracks.
  • Customizable Design Options: Build your villa your way.
  • Exclusive Community: Largest gated estate with luxurious offerings.
  • High ROI Potential: Significant appreciation expected due to rising demand.
  • Golden Visa Eligibility: Secure long-term UAE residency through property ownership.
